faqs.question: Is Amity University Lucknow famous?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Lucknow is famous for its BTech and MBA programmes. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum.

faqs.question: Is Amity University Lucknow private or government?
faqs.answer: Amity University Lucknow is a private university and is a constituent unit of Amity University, Uttar Pradesh. It is recognised by DISR, Ministry of Science Technology, Government of India as a Scientific and Research Organisation. The university is accredited with an A+ grade by NAAC, Bar Council of India, Council of Architecture, National Council of Teachers Education, and Distance Education Council. Further, it is approved by UGC, PCI, AICTE, and the Western Association of Schools and Colleges (WASC), USA.

faqs.question: Is Amity University Lucknow campus safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Lucknow campus is safe for girls and boys. The university campus is located in center of Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. It has a good connection with roads and public transports. CCTV cameras are installed in the campus to keep a check on students safety.

faqs.question: Why choose Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Amity University Lucknow is recognised by the DISR, Ministry of Science and Technology, Government of India, as a Scientific and Research Organisation. The university is accredited with an A+ grade by NAAC. It has a group of experienced faculty members to provide quality education to students.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Amity University Lucknow are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. These courses are offered to students for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. Amity University Lucknow courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry.
The university offers courses in full-time mode and across several specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Biotechnology, Artificial Intelligence, and Aerospace Engineering. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Amity LKO in the table provided below:
Check out the below video to learn more about the courses offered at the university:
Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Amity University in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Amity University Lucknow placement report 2025 has not been out as of yet. While the Amity University placement for school of Engineering has been out. The highest package offered was INR 35.9 LPA. The average package offered was INR 9.6 LPA. The median package offered was INR 6 LPA. Three companies offered international offers to the students. The top recruiters that participated during the placement drive 2025 were Amazon, Google, IBM and many more.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Amity University Lucknow offers various programmes to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses in streams like Engineering, Animation, Computer Science, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, Fine Arts, etc. At the UG level, the university offers courses like BSc, LLB, BCom, BA, BBA, etc. for a duration of 3 years.

At the PG level, the university offers MBA, MA, MSc, MTech, MCom, MFA, and other programmes. They can also enroll in programmes and other courses at the Amity University campus in Lucknow. There are BTech specialisations available, including IT, Mechanical, Aerospace, Artificial Intelligence, and Civil Engineering. Merit and entrance exam results determine admission to different courses. A list of , their prerequisites, and the total cost of tuition are displayed in the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Amity University Lucknow offers a BTech programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and is approved by the AICTE. The total tuition fee of BTech at Amity Lucknow ranges between INR 8.3 Lacs and INR 15.4 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BTech at Amity University Lucknow?

faqs.answer: A:    INR 10.4 lakh - INR 13.8 lakh is the total tuition fee range at Amity Lucknow for  MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to MBA course is based on national-level entrance exam CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. The university also conducts AMCAT for providing admission to MBA course. Additionally, candidates need to qualify English test for admission to MBA International. The shortlisted candidates are further called for a personal interview round. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.
faqs.question: What is MBA fees at Amity University Lucknow?

faqs.answer: A:    Amity University Lucknow offers a MBA course to students at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at Amity Lucknow ranges between INR 10.4 Lacs and INR 13.8 lakh.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I have pursued B.Com (Hons) from Amity University Lucknow; great campus, best college life.

review_content.Placements: The percent of students placed in this course is 90%. The highest package for this course was 4,50,000, and the lowest was 2,00,000. The top recruiting companies include Amazon, HCL, etc. 100% of students get internships from the course in HCL. Mostly, data analyst roles are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for the B.Com course include a library, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel quality was quite good, but it could be more well-structured, and the quality of food available in the mess was great in taste. Every weekend they have something special. Other than this, a canteen, medical store, and sports facilities were also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: BBA at Amity University, Lucknow: The best time of my life.

review_content.Placements: After BBA, placements are not that high that year. Around 35% of students got placed. The highest package for a graduation is 7.9 LPA. Companies like HDFC Bank, RBL Bank, and Mahindra Finance come to the campus. Sales executive roles are offered by recruiters. Also, the internship percentage is very high.
review_content.Infrastructure: At Amity University, you will always get top-class infrastructure available. Libraries, classes, labs, and even the corridors are so neat and clean, you always feel like being in the best college. The food in the mess is also served fresh and tasty. For every medical emergency, there is a van always available, and first aid is easily available. Every sport is played, like table tennis, lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% students were placed, the highest package is 4.5 LPA, and it is in Quality Assurance. The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Alkem Laboratories, Pfizer, etc. Overall, the placement is average, but the placement cell tries its best to get every student placed in a good company with a good package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

reviews_list.batch_info: LL.M in Criminal Law - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.

review_content.Placements: Self-placements are a better option here since few recruiters visit the college in this branch for placements, so we can head to Noida. It is a branch for better recruiters. Here we can get a good LL.M degree of value in no time, and with ease we can score well. All these help in future career prospects.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Counselling Psychology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of my college.

review_content.Placements: Since I had to study further, as well as most of my batchmates wanted the same. Placement is not a factor in the course. Even though there are provisions for placement in many publishing houses and companies in post is content/creative writers with CTC around 2 LPA. As far as internships, we have a summer project, where we have to submit a detailed research paper. This paper is a subject as in whole and is taken very seriously. Weekly reports have to be represented on the progress, and each individual is assigned a mentor. There is no stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Counselling Psychology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: We have a heavy workload, and too much emphasis on attendance, but good networking and internships.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunities are represented to students but not very thoroughly, at the end, a few get placed. Students got internships from local as well as prestigious companies like Counsel India. The top roles are trainee psychologists and HR roles in companies as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department is overall nice. The infrastructure and campus are quite good but need more maintenance. The library is an amazing place to be in, canteen and food services are okay. Overall it is good, still needs to improve a lot. There is ample ground space and opportunities to engage in sports and games.

overview_faqs.question: What is fees of Amity Lucknow BTech course?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Amity Lucknow BTech ranges between INR 8.3 lakh - INR 15.4 lakh as per official sources. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BTech course is based on national or state-level Engineering entrance exam or AMCAT score. The university also accepts CUET UG or JEE Main score for admission to all BTech specialisations, except 3 Continent and CSE International. For International specialisation, Amity conducts an English test followed by a PI round. The university also accepts NEET score for BTech Biotechnology. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

overview_faqs.question: What should I do If I fail to deposit Amity Lucknow fee on time?
overview_faqs.answer: In case a student fails to pay the Amity University Lucknow fee within the specified time, he or she need to approach the admission office via 'Post/ track your query' link available on the admission microsite. The admission committee of the university considers request for extension of date depending on the availability of the seats.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee payment modes at Amity University, Lucknow?
overview_faqs.answer: Students can pay the semester, application or any other fee at Amity University Lucknow using the below methods:Pay at Amity University Campus via Pay Order/ Demand Draft.Through Bharat Bill PaymentEasy Monthly Instalments via third party companies, independent of AmityThrough PaytmThrough NEFT / RTGS (NO IMPS) in Bank.Through Demand Draft/ Pay-order/ Cash at Axis Bank BranchesThrough Net banking/Credit Card/Debit Card

overview_faqs.question: Does Amity University, Lucknow refund hostel fee?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity University Lucknow hostel fee once paid will not be refunded in case of withdrawal at any point of time. The university refunds security deposit after adjustment/ clearance of dues, if any like the following:Alumni Life Member Fee INR 1,000 (Compulsory)IT Damage ChargesExamination DuesID Card Charges INR 500 (If not returned)Any other dues (Gate pass Charges/Duplicate ID Card etc.)Admin Damage ChargesCentral Library ChargesAcademics (Lab, Department Library/book bank, CRC, etc.)

The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Alkem Laboratories, Pfizer, etc. Overall, the placement is average, but the placement cell tries its best to get every student placed in a good company with a good package.
content.Infrastructure: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

individual_reviews.course: LL.M in Criminal Law - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.

content.Placements: Self-placements are a better option here since few recruiters visit the college in this branch for placements, so we can head to Noida. It is a branch for better recruiters. Here we can get a good LL.M degree of value in no time, and with ease we can score well. All these help in future career prospects.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Counselling Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Since I had to study further, as well as most of my batchmates wanted the same. Placement is not a factor in the course. Even though there are provisions for placement in many publishing houses and companies in post is content/creative writers with CTC around 2 LPA. As far as internships, we have a summer project, where we have to submit a detailed research paper. This paper is a subject as in whole and is taken very seriously. Weekly reports have to be represented on the progress, and each individual is assigned a mentor. There is no stipend.
content.Infrastructure: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity Lucknow provides direct admission to candidates fufiling the below-mentioned criteria:Candidates must pass Class 12 (CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards) with at least 80% aggregate for direct admission to UG courses. Aspirants eligible for direct admission get exemption from the entrance exam.Aspirants with at least 70 percentile in CAT/ MAT exam are eligible for direct admission to MBA course. Such candidates are exempted from entrance test and can directly come for GDPI round.Direct admission is not applicable on non-MBA course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BBA at Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: A pass in Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate is required to apply for BBA specialisations. The minimum aggregate is not specified by the university for BBA Tourism Management. Candidates passing Class 12 with at least 80% aggregate are eligible for direct admission to BBA course. Additionally, admission to BBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam or CUET UG score. As soon as the selection rounds are over, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The total tuition fee for BBA is ranges between INR 8.58 Lacs and INR 12.36 Lacs as per an unofficial source. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.

faqs.question: How can I get admission a Amity University Lucknow?

Selected candidates need to pay the programme fees to confirm their seat in the university.

placement_data.title: Amity University Lucknow Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: The Amity University Lucknow placement report 2026 has not been out as of yet. While the Amity University placement for school of Engineering has been out. The highest package offered was INR 35.9 LPA . The average package offered was INR 9.6 LPA . The median package offered was INR 6 LPA . Three companies offered international offers to the students. The top recruiters that participated during the placement drive 2025 were Amazon, Google, IBM and many more.

During the Amity Lucknow placement drive 2025, top companies such as EY, Deloitte, Pepsi, Google, Facebook among others participated. The placement cell conducts skill building workshops and pre placement mock series. The cell also keep close corporations with leading companies.

reviews.review_heading: I have pursued B.Com (Hons) from Amity University Lucknow; great campus, best college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the B.Com course include a library, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel quality was quite good, but it could be more well-structured, and the quality of food available in the mess was great in taste. Every weekend they have something special. Other than this, a canteen, medical store, and sports facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: BBA at Amity University, Lucknow: The best time of my life.
reviews.review_text: At Amity University, you will always get top-class infrastructure available. Libraries, classes, labs, and even the corridors are so neat and clean, you always feel like being in the best college. The food in the mess is also served fresh and tasty. For every medical emergency, there is a van always available, and first aid is easily available. Every sport is played, like table tennis, lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.
reviews.review_text: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

reviews.review_heading: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

reviews.review_heading: We have a heavy workload, and too much emphasis on attendance, but good networking and internships.
reviews.review_text: The department is overall nice. The infrastructure and campus are quite good but need more maintenance. The library is an amazing place to be in, canteen and food services are okay. Overall it is good, still needs to improve a lot. There is ample ground space and opportunities to engage in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and security are great. The hostel facility is good. The food is not that great. The campus has great Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. The library is so beautiful with all the course books and extracurricular books as well. The quality of food in the mess is not at all good. Canteen food is better than mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it provides the best and most reliable packages.
reviews.review_text: Libraries and hostel rooms are fantastic and clean. The service that is provided in the library and classrooms is very impressive, but sometimes Wi-Fi stops working, which is a manageable point. Medical facilities are also provided there for some small health issues. Ground is very big, so students can enjoy their recess and free time.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, bedsheet pillow and pillow cover were provided and table was provided. Meal quality was not so good but breakfast was really very good. We could complete the registration from the official website of Amity University Lucknow.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Lucknow campus.
reviews.review_text: We have here Wi-Fi connections, computer labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is very good with good cleanliness, supportive wardens and staff. Rooms are also quite good and if we look for medical facilities here we have an infirmary in our hostel which has well-specialized doctors. And if we talk about sports and games here is very nice as we have a big backyard ground where we have basketball court, badminton court, cricket ground, and many indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University in Lucknow For M.Sc.  MB Course admission in 25-26.
reviews.review_text: This course's infrastructure quality is very good and uses high-quality materials and products. The college has classrooms, bathrooms, a library, a canteen, a hostel, etc. The canteen facilities are also good and there are many varieties of food available.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University in Uttar Pradesh, course and admission.
reviews.review_text: In this college, library facilities are available and there are all subject books present in the cell. Department classroom is very clean and the bathroom also. In this college, sports committee is organizing sports and games facilities but it is not free. There are charges and rise pool facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: My personal experience in Amity University Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good and furnished with all the facilities provided on the campus itself. Talking about the library, it is the best place on the whole campus to sit and study with the best decor. Here, the vibes are really impressive. Wi-Fi for the whole time is provided and we also have water coolers, a canteen, the best sitting areas, and fully air-conditioned corridors and classes too.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure structure is well maintained. The campus is very beautiful. Wi-Fi also works nicely. Classrooms are now maintained. The library is also very good. Books are available over there but the laboratories are not so okay because the AC doesn't work. Instruments and most chemicals are not available. Hostels are not at all good they are just overpriced and the mess food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure with an amazing youth fest and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well equipped with the proper chemicals available. Classrooms have good Wi-Fi coverage. The best part is the library. We have a lot of books to read and it was built beautifully. The hostels are good and have a well-equipped gym and sports room on the campus.

college_info.college_name: Amity University Lucknow Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amity University Lucknow offers a MBA course to students at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at Amity Lucknow ranges between INR 10.4 Lacs and INR 13.8 lakh.

INR 4 lakh and INR 13.7 lakh is the total tuition fee range for BBA as per official sources. The fee varies as per the specialisation. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BBA courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts CUET UG score for providing admission to BBA course. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

INR 10.4 lakh - INR 13.8 lakh is the total tuition fee range at Amity Lucknow for  MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to MBA course is based on national-level entrance exam CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. The university also conducts AMCAT for providing admission to MBA course. Additionally, candidates need to qualify English test for admission to MBA International. The shortlisted candidates are further called for a personal interview round. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.
Yes, Amity University Lucknow provides scholarships to students to help them financially. The university offers scholarships to students under several slabs, check the details given below:

faqs.answer: SRM University, Sonepat, also referred to as SRMU, is a private university that is a part of the SRM Group of Institutions. SRMU was established under the Haryana Private Universities ACT 2013. The group also includes other state universities: SRM University-Sikkim and SRM University-Amravati in addition to SRM Institute of Science and Technology, which is a deemed university headquartered in Chennai. SRM University, Sonepat is recognised by the UGC and ALU and is aprooved by the BCI, DSIR, NCHMCT.
faqs.question: Q: Is SRM University Sonepat a deemed university?

faqs.answer: The University offers a wide range of UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes across various fields such as Engineering, Commerce, Management, Accounting, Computers & IT, Law, Hotel & Hospitality, Science and Arts. Some of the popular courses offered by SRMU include B.Tech, MBA, M.Tech, B.A. LL.B. And Ph.D. among various others. SRM Sonepat admission is offered in two modes, I. e. Early Admission Mode and Regular Admission Mode on first cum first serve basis.

overview_faqs.question: Is SRM University Sonepat a deemed university?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM University, Sonepat, also referred to as SRMU, is a private university that is a part of the SRM Group of Institutions. SRMU was established under the Haryana Private Universities ACT 2013. The group also includes other state universities: SRM University-Sikkim and SRM University-Amravati in addition to SRM Institute of Science and Technology, which is a deemed university headquartered in Chennai. SRM University, Sonepat is recognised by the UGC and ALU and is aprooved by the BCI, DSIR, NCHMCT.

review_summary.college_name: SRM University Sonepat Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Feels lucky to get a seat in this university.

content.Placements: Product and service-based companies are the major recruitment partners of our University. SAP, Oracle, and Dell are some of the notable partnered companies with a package of above 4.5 LPA with better recruitment standards. Every student got one of the opportunities at the end of the recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The ambience of SRM University, Delhi, NCR, located in Haryana with a luxurious lifestyle get to know about personal skills along with the general. To apply for accommodation, there are two sections where is mid level and other is high level. Both levels were associated with maximized facilities for living peacefully, and there are no restrictions for the visitors to visit the campus or hostel accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SRM University, Sonepat, pure truth, is it really worth the SRM hype?

content.Placements: Placements are just on paper. I must say they have internal criteria that we have to fit to sit in placements. I had a talk with seniors, and they also said the same thing to me. Toppers and cream batch placements are at an average level.
content.Infrastructure: I would rate 4 out of 5 for labs. Our college has Mac labs and high-end PCs that are given on an individual basis. Classrooms are trash with iron benches and are not comfortable at all. There are projectors installed in classrooms, but some of them don't work. Overall, I would rate it 3 out of 5.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placements right after the first year, as the curriculum is very advanced and students are taught practical skills right from the beginning. TCS, Swiggy, IBM, Microsoft, Amazon, etc., are the top recruiters of SRMUH. Almost 95 percent of students got placed in my batch.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides hostel service for both boys and girls. Rooms are decent-looking, but we have to maintain our own room. I am not the one with cleanliness where on the other hand my friend is a freak in terms of cleanliness.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent learning environment with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: I am a student of the Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) program batch of 2024-2027. Our course focuse on computer programming, databases, networking, and web technologies. This prepare students for careers in the IT and software industry. During our placement drive, 50 percent of our students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Our BCA program is well developed with modern infrastructure. Facilities to support both academic and practical learning. The campus provides high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. It is accessible in classrooms, computer labs, and common areas like cafes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Moderately satisfied with faculty and the teaching material. Placements are satisfactory.

content.Placements: Students who are placed in my branch are about 10–15%. The highest package offered is 18 LPA, the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, TATA, JCB, and Google. About 30–40% of students get internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: There are multiple facilities available in our course. It includes many computer labs where each lab is assigned to a different programming language and subject. Central Wi-Fi is provided all over the college campus with satisfactory speed. The classrooms are also good and clean. The library is very huge with a collection of every type of book.

admission_process.title: SRM University Sonepat Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SRM University Admission 2025 is completely based on the entrance exams conducted by the University: SRM JEE,SRMHCAT. The University also accepts National-level entrance exams likeSRMHCAT/ SRMJEEE/ CUET/ CLAT/ CAT/ MATetc for admission to its programmes. To get admission, candidates also need to qualify the entrance exams and complete the admission procedure of the University. Find below the step wise admission process of SRM University 2025:
Step 1: SRM University Application Process
Candidate must visit the University’s official website and register as instructed on the website. To fill the application form candidates first first have to register online.
Step 2: SRM University Entrance exam

Candidates have to appear for the course-specific entrance exam. The entrance exam are conducted by the University for its flagship course. The University also accepts national entrance exams for admission to its programme.
Step 3: Interview/counseling

Once the candidate's application form is approved, they are shortlisted. The shortlisted candidates are invited for a personal interview/ counseling. Attending the interview is mandatory for admission to their desired programme.

The university will start the Spot Counselling and enrollment based on CUET-UG score. Aspirants meeting the criteria can also avail of the scholarship offered by the university. Check below the snip for reference:
Step 4: Final Interview
Candidate can now finalise their seat by paying the course wise tuition/admisssion fee.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission into SRM University Sonepat BSc course?
faqs.answer: SRM University Sonepat BSc course admission required candidates to have Class 12 exam with 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ST).

faqs.question: Can I get admission to BSc courses at SRM University Sonepat with 50% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission to theBSc course at SRM University with a 50% aggregate in the Class 12 exam. For BSc programme admission candidates must have Class 12 with 45% aggregate and 40% aggregate for SC/ST students. Students must have studied equivalent subjects to the course specialisations. The subjects such as Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology, Agriculture, etc. For the selection process, students were shortlisted based on the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation for the BSc course at SRM University Sonepat?
faqs.answer: Yes, SRM University Sonepat does offers seat reservation. A minimum of 25% seats for admission in the university shall be reserved for students of the State of Haryana, out of which 10% seats shall be reserved for students belonging to Scheduled Castes of the State of Haryana as stated under clause 35 (3) of Haryana State Private Universities Act,  2006.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM University Sonepat Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University has well-furnished hostel rooms, spacious with AC and Non-AC facility with fractional charges. 24 hours power back-up, pharmacy, stationary and provisional outlet, gym and indoor games.The hostel has a Lush green park, swimming pool and beauty parlor. Parent/Guardian of wards can leisurely spend time in the spacious lounge. Well-qualified male and female physician visit to the hostel at specified hours.

library.description: Library is stocked with around 12,000 books, 100+ printed journals and magazines, more than 35,000 online journals and other online databases, audio-visual materials and CD-ROMs. The library provides access to digital library (ASTM, IEEE,  J-Gate complete, DELNET, Manupatra Information Solutions, etc.)

reviews.review_heading: Feels lucky to get a seat in this university.
reviews.review_text: The ambience of SRM University, Delhi, NCR, located in Haryana with a luxurious lifestyle get to know about personal skills along with the general. To apply for accommodation, there are two sections where is mid level and other is high level. Both levels were associated with maximized facilities for living peacefully, and there are no restrictions for the visitors to visit the campus or hostel accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: SRM University, Sonepat, pure truth, is it really worth the SRM hype?
reviews.review_text: I would rate 4 out of 5 for labs. Our college has Mac labs and high-end PCs that are given on an individual basis. Classrooms are trash with iron benches and are not comfortable at all. There are projectors installed in classrooms, but some of them don't work. Overall, I would rate it 3 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides hostel service for both boys and girls. Rooms are decent-looking, but we have to maintain our own room. I am not the one with cleanliness where on the other hand my friend is a freak in terms of cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent learning environment with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our BCA program is well developed with modern infrastructure. Facilities to support both academic and practical learning. The campus provides high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. It is accessible in classrooms, computer labs, and common areas like cafes.

reviews.review_heading: Moderately satisfied with faculty and the teaching material. Placements are satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: There are multiple facilities available in our course. It includes many computer labs where each lab is assigned to a different programming language and subject. Central Wi-Fi is provided all over the college campus with satisfactory speed. The classrooms are also good and clean. The library is very huge with a collection of every type of book.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: As management students, we have the chance to do practical management through organizing events, sports, paper presentations, etc. Also, the course structure is well-designed. In MBA, they conduct separate events. Hostel rooms are simple and okay for student life. They provide you with a study environment in the hostel rooms. Wardens are very responsive to any issues like electricity, water, disturbances, and other concerns. The bathrooms are cleaned twice a day. You will get Wi-Fi facility with...

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good. It provides the best meal. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian students can enjoy their meals. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner are provided to students. I personally like the quantity and quality of food they provide to students, as it is amazing. There is 24 hours of water.

reviews.review_heading: My Review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are awesome with limited restrictions. North Indian and South Indian menus are available, and students can opt anything based upon their wishes. Non-veg is available 4 times a week. AC and non-AC rooms are available. Housekeeping is done daily.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is on a sharing basis. Some have a room of 3 beds sharing, and some are 4-bed sharing types. Hostels are average in terms of infrastructure and accommodation. Buildings are five-storeyed. Cleanliness is maintained and is cleaned by helpers every day. Mess food provided was also hygienic and good.

reviews.review_heading: It is good and highly recommended for all students.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are all gorgeous and okay with mats, carpets, chairs, etc. All things are very good and air-ventilated. It looks like a very new university. It has a good infrastructure. I did not stay at the hostel, but I have seen that the hostel rooms are much better and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and infrastructure are very good, but placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained, the library is awesome, and there is a 24/7 Wi-Fi connection. Computer labs are good. Hostels and mess food are not so good, but the roommate and surroundings are good, and the canteen is near the hostel. There are medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the psychology department.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are very good at this college. Our college has a very good signal. Classrooms are well-ventilated with air-conditioners. The library is equipped with air-conditioners. All medical facilities are there. All sports and games are played. Mess and canteen are also affordable and provide quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are pretty nice for my course. We have AC classrooms and free Wi-Fi facilities available. We have a library to sit in our free time and read a book or study. Hostel food quality is good. We have 3 canteens and hospital is also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: We are fully satisfied as our faculty is so supportive and helpful.
reviews.review_text: University provides good infrastructure with good computer labs. Wi-Fi is available and fully air-conditioned and furnished classrooms. In computer labs, there is a sufficient amount number of computers. The university also provides medical facilities it has its own hospital which has all types of doctors and emergency doctor also.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the locality.
reviews.review_text: Amazing and well-maintained infrastructure is there. Annually, added accelerator and more changes are in process. Classrooms are enough to have a class 10th of 6 students at one sit and there will be air conditioned too. JR Mac claps with excellent systems and also has a corporate office. Look that gives a vibrant and JR Mac claps with excellent systems and also has a corporate office. Look that gives a vibrant and energetic feeling to the student.

college_info.college_name: SRM University Sonepat Scholarship Details

paragraphs: To encourage and support meritorious candidates, SRM University, Sonepat has implemented a very distinctive scholarship programme called the ‘SRMH Scholar Search Programme’. Under this Programme, an applicant may qualify for a scholarship up to 100% on the University Tuition Fee. The scholarship offered is applicable for the duration of the programme, subject to maintaining the required CGPA. Please note that all scholarships are subject to availability and are granted on first come first served basis.
SRM University Sonepat Merit-Based Scholarship 2024
SRM University Sonepat offers upto 100% scholarship to meritorious students. Candidates can check the scholarship criteria in the table provided below:

It is mandatory for candidates applying under the category of Haryana Domicile to submit a Domicile certificate at the time of counseling/admission.

Students should have cleared all the subjects of their respective semesters.

SRMUH believes in holistic learning and gives importance to each individual student who excels at all spheres of youth life. In this regard, sports being an essential tool to empower one, both physically and mentally,such scholarship schemes are provided to motivate and inspire students excelling in the field of sports.

college_info.college_name: Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM)

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM):

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) has been rated 4 on placements on the basis of 129 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM)?

faqs.answer: A:    Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) has placed its selected students in known and reputed companies such as Gndu Rc Sultanpur Lodhi, Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, Amazon Transpotaion, Samsung R And D Institute India Noida, Deloitte And Touche Assurancr Enterprise Risk And Services India Pvt Ltd, Om Shanti English Medium School, Divine Engineering, Pantaloonsadityabirlacom, Kala Genset Pvt. Ltd., Indusnet Techshu, Shahin Construction, The Hindu Group Of Publications
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters from Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) when it comes to placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM and MCA. The Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) course fee ranges between INR 1,16,940 to 4,82,870.

faqs.answer: A:    Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, B.Com, BCA, B.Arch, MCA, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) are Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM)?

faqs.answer:
A:    Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechA candidate who has passed any diploma examination or equivalent examination and obtained an aggregate minimum of 45% marks taken together in all the subjects of the final year (Fifth and sixth semester) diploma Examination (Q.E) is eligible for admission to B.E courses, and 40% of marks in Q. E. in case of SC, ST and Backward Classes of Karnataka candidates.BBACandidate must have passed in PUC / CBSE / ISCE or 10+2 or equivalent examination.B.ComCandidate must have passed in PUC / CBSE / ISCE or 10+2 or equivalent examination.BCACandidates with Diploma in Engineering (of three years duration of Govt.of Karnataka ) with a minimum of 35% marks in aggregate in all the semesters / years are also eligible to apply.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.MCACandidate should have studied Maths at 10+2 stage or at graduation level.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) for UG/PG courses?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Bad placement record for year 2024 passouts.

review_content.Placements: Till mid-September, no students have been placed from the ECE department. Our placement officer doesn't concentrate on core companies but rather focuses on IT, and tells us to prepare for IT companies instead of focusing on the core electronics company. The average package you see will be from computer science and allied branches which is obviously inflated. I have seen the average package my seniors who are placed in IT is around 4 LPA. 1 of my seniors got placed into Micron Semi for 17 LPA which is the highest from my department.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are okay, but during gloomy days the lighting is not enough. But lab conditions are very bad. Nothing works properly in analog and digital lab. Our communication lab is straight from 19th century, you can hardly find a set of working components. The voltage regulators are broken, they keep fluctuating, and the signal/frequency generators. They cannot generate a signal in the millivolt range, yet you are expected to get output.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, and a good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Very good placements which is given by the college and the students are getting placed for many jobs in the campus placements which is given by the college. The students who are applying for these placements should be careful and should carefully apply.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at the college is good, and the hostel is also good according to many students who time me, but the good is not that great, and the rest of the things in and from the college are good, and they are still trying to improve all the left out mistakes.

DSATM admission- DSATM accepts KCET and COMEDK UGET entrance exams for BTech admission. The KCET cutoff for DSATM is released separately for each course and college. For the MBA program, admission is open to candidates who have a minimum of a 3-year recognized bachelor's degree or equivalent examination.

overview_faqs.question: How good is Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management?
overview_faqs.answer: Dayananda Sagar academy of technology and management in Bangalore is generally considered a good institution, particularly for engineering and technology courses. It offers strong in first access, modern facilities, and experienced faculty creating a positive academic environment. The campus is well equipped with advance labs recreational areas and green spaces fastering both academic and extra curricular development. Placements at DSATM are decent with many students securing jobs through campus requirement. The average salary package is around for lpa, with the highest package going up to 33 lpa in recent years list of the college has a good track record of management studies in Karnataka.

review_summary.college_name: Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The overall campus environment is good and the campus is located in a very peaceful area.

content.Placements: Around 70 percent of the students got placed based on their skills. The average package here is around 5 LPA-6 LPA. The placements vary from department to department. More than 200 companies visited the college for hiring, and almost 400 students hired, and the process is still going on.
content.Infrastructure: The food quality and indoor infrastructure are really good. The room maintenance is also good. There are 3 people in a room for boys and 4 in a room for girls. Also, the food here is unlimited and available every day. The only problem is with the hot water.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (IoT and Cyber Security with Block Chain Technology) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great college with good facilities.

content.Placements: It's the VTU and affiliated college for our (2022-2026) batch, but the next batch is completely autonomous. Placements are going on, so we can't say the highest and lowest packages. Recruiting companies are Infosys, IBM, Capgemini, TCS, Visa, Hashedin by Deloitte, HP, etc. It's all dependent on the student's performance for top scores and higher packages, as the efforts from the placement team are extraordinary.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi both in the hostel and on the campus. The quality of food is pretty good as they follow a particular list of food items that are prepared every day. The hostel is clean as they clean the rooms and bathrooms every day except for Sunday, and there are washing machines too. There are sports teams selected through the selection process.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad placement record for year 2024 passouts.

content.Placements: Till mid-September, no students have been placed from the ECE department. Our placement officer doesn't concentrate on core companies but rather focuses on IT, and tells us to prepare for IT companies instead of focusing on the core electronics company. The average package you see will be from computer science and allied branches which is obviously inflated. I have seen the average package my seniors who are placed in IT is around 4 LPA. 1 of my seniors got placed into Micron Semi for 17 LPA which is the highest from my department.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are okay, but during gloomy days the lighting is not enough. But lab conditions are very bad. Nothing works properly in analog and digital lab. Our communication lab is straight from 19th century, you can hardly find a set of working components. The voltage regulators are broken, they keep fluctuating, and the signal/frequency generators. They cannot generate a signal in the millivolt range, yet you are expected to get output.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, and a good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Very good placements which is given by the college and the students are getting placed for many jobs in the campus placements which is given by the college. The students who are applying for these placements should be careful and should carefully apply.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at the college is good, and the hostel is also good according to many students who time me, but the good is not that great, and the rest of the things in and from the college are good, and they are still trying to improve all the left out mistakes.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A decent college with good infrastructure and a good student body.

content.Placements: When it comes to placements, all the Dayananda Sagar institutions come together for a competitive one. Basically, all the candidates are taken for their main placements from the main campus, where well-reputed companies visit the college. In this institution, the salaries offered are around 6-7 LPA on average, with the highest packages varying into double digits. The offers are pretty good at Dayananda Sagar for students to settle into their dream job with just the skills they've mastered.
content.Infrastructure: Campus on Kanakapura Road is a bit far from the city. It's not huge, but it's not very small either, it has a decent capacity with specific blocks for particular courses, equipped with labs and lecture halls. The infrastructure is satisfactory for students to study in this college, but you can't expect it to meet every need.

paragraphs: Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM) admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in KCET, COMEDK BArch, and COMEDK UGET, etc.Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM)offers courses at UG level in Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce and Architecture and Planning stream. The institute offers B.Com for 3 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 2,20,950 - 4,82,870. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The overall campus environment is good and the campus is located in a very peaceful area.
reviews.review_text: The food quality and indoor infrastructure are really good. The room maintenance is also good. There are 3 people in a room for boys and 4 in a room for girls. Also, the food here is unlimited and available every day. The only problem is with the hot water.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi both in the hostel and on the campus. The quality of food is pretty good as they follow a particular list of food items that are prepared every day. The hostel is clean as they clean the rooms and bathrooms every day except for Sunday, and there are washing machines too. There are sports teams selected through the selection process.

reviews.review_heading: Bad placement record for year 2024 passouts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay, but during gloomy days the lighting is not enough. But lab conditions are very bad. Nothing works properly in analog and digital lab. Our communication lab is straight from 19th century, you can hardly find a set of working components. The voltage regulators are broken, they keep fluctuating, and the signal/frequency generators. They cannot generate a signal in the millivolt range, yet you are expected to get output.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, and a good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at the college is good, and the hostel is also good according to many students who time me, but the good is not that great, and the rest of the things in and from the college are good, and they are still trying to improve all the left out mistakes.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with good infrastructure and a good student body.
reviews.review_text: Campus on Kanakapura Road is a bit far from the city. It's not huge, but it's not very small either, it has a decent capacity with specific blocks for particular courses, equipped with labs and lecture halls. The infrastructure is satisfactory for students to study in this college, but you can't expect it to meet every need.

reviews.review_heading: A modern infrastructure campus for its area, with decent placements and friendly lecturers.
reviews.review_text: DSATM is a 10-acre campus with modern infrastructure, especially the architecture block. It is a green campus powered by solar energy. The library, gym, and activity center are available. The canteen has recently been upgraded to include non-vegetarian options. The hostel is very near to the college, offering good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with all facilities and a good environment. It has good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel facility for both boys and girls with Wi-Fi. It has a well-maintained environment. The library is good. Separate sections are maintained in each course. A digital library is also available. Students can use a computer available in the library for their study purposes.

reviews.review_heading: I am experiencing good education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and they have a good canteen as well, offering a variety of food.

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements.
reviews.review_text: There are very good facilities and infrastructure in DSATM, with a huge and good lab in DSATM college,  having a good hostel facility, and a clean mess. The food quality is average and not worth for money, and the hostel fee is high and not worth for money.

reviews.review_heading: Fascinating about placements this year 2025
reviews.review_text: Every classroom and lab has a projector. There are no benches. Only wheel chairs are there for students. There are 3 Wi-Fi connections for every building. The speed is moderate. The library is also very good. It has all kinds of books. To be frank, the hostel and canteen food is not good. The sports facility is limited even the gym. Medical facilities are provided in every building.

reviews.review_heading: A honest review of our college.
reviews.review_text: Campus of our college is amazing. It consists of 10 acres. It's all about greenery and good without areas. Our hostel is very good and it has good food and mess. There is good Wi-Fi connection in college at every part and we have amphitheatre too.

reviews.review_heading: The college I know and the best I have known. It has good faculty members and education.
reviews.review_text: Classes are very good with ventilation and projectors needed for interactive learning. Classrooms are more and occupy the space for all students. Labs are also available for every department with well-equipped computer systems and applications. The Wi-Fi availability is throughout the campus but may vary in some places. The quality of the hotel and its facilities, food, and maintenance is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dayananda Sagar Academy Of Technology And Management (DSATM).
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure includes well-designed benches with ample seating. The college infrastructure is generally considered good, with well-maintained classrooms, modern labs equipped with advanced technology, a spacious library with ample study areas, and a decent canteen offering a variety of food options. However, there are some old buildings. The Wi-Fi connectivity could be improved in certain areas to fully support the needs of students requiring high-bandwidth access for research and ...

reviews.review_heading: Best college to do engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are mainly 4 blocks A, B, C, and M, all stand differently from each other. Hostel is very clean and both South and North Indian food will be provided. The course is best like CSE. CSE-related branches are very helpful for the students and they help in placements also.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college infrastructure, faculty, and facilities provided to students.
reviews.review_text: So, the facility of a library is available where you will find each and every book related to your course. Classrooms are digital, having projectors, and teachers utilize those for teaching. I am not in a hostel of my college, but I have heard that food is average. The food available in the canteen is of the best quality, as we usually go there for lunch. Indoor games such as table tennis, chess, and carrom are available.

highlights.summary:
UEM is ranked 92 out of 269 colleges under the 'Engineering' category in the India Today Rankings 2025.

IIRF Overall Rankings 2025 have been released, and UEM Jaipur is ranked 98 out of 103 under the Top Private Universities category in India.

UEM Jaipur is also ranked 21 out of 175 engineering colleges in the Times Engineering Rankings 2025.

college_info.intro:
UEM Jaipur's popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Capgemini, Infosys, TCS, PwC, and others. UEM Jaipur mandates NPTEL certification for each and every student each semester, ensuring that there is consistent skill enhancement through courses by the IIT Madras and the Ministry of Education. The 11kV/0.433kV GSS Laboratory is a unique feature on campus, providing Electrical Engineering students with advanced hands-on training.
The following are the USPs of joining UEM Jaipur:
Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the University of Engineering & Management, UEM Jaipur Jaipur Rajasthan and their respective eligibility and UEM Jaipur fees:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    As per the external sources, UEM Jaipur alumni are placed in leading companies such as TCS, HCL, Wipro, Accenture, Infosys, etc. They are working under multiple sectors, such as Engineering, Business Development, Education, IT, HR, Finance, Marketing, Sales and more. The detailed sector-wise alumni placement record is shown below:Note: The domain under the ‘Others’ category includes Consulting, Sales, Human Resources, Marketing, Support, Research and Finance.
faqs.question: Where do UEM Jaipur alumni work?

faqs.answer: A:    University of Engineering & Management (UEM), Jaipur offers good placements annually for courses like BTech, MCA and MBA, etc. As per the latest report, all students got at least one job offer from reputed recruiters during UEM Jaipur placements in 2024. As per the latest report, 75% of students of the batch 2025 secured 2 job offers with handsome packages. 5 students have received 4 jobs, 8 students received 3 jobs, and 6 students have 5 job offers in hand during UEM Jaipur placements 202
faqs.question: How are the placements in UEM, Jaipur?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered during UEM Jaipur placements in 2023 and 2024 was INR 72 LPA. The same is tabulated below:ParticularsHighest Package (2023)Highest Package (2024)Highest packageINR 72 LPAINR 72 LPA

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
UG and PG courses are available at UEM Jaipur. These courses are offered in a number of different streams, including engineering and management. The institution provides students with BTech, BCA, and other courses at the undergraduate level. The university provides MBA and MTech courses to students at the postgraduate level. Numerous specializations, including computer science and engineering, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, civil engineering, electronics and communication engineering, and others, are offered by BTech programs.
All students who are prepared for an outcome-based education to lead a happy and productive life in the future can choose among specializations in artificial intelligence, machine learning, the internet of things, and other fields.. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the University of Engineering and Management Jaipur and their respective eligibility and UEM Jaipur MBA fees:

faqs.answer: A:    UEM Kolkata is a private university established in 2015 and is approved by the AICTE, UGC, and the Bar Council of India. It offers various undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral-level courses across multiple streams. MBA is a two-year full-time dual specialisation course divided into four semesters.They also offers part-time MBA course. UEM Kolkata offers MBA in eight specialisations and is ranked #44 by Times 2023. The fees for MBA programmes at UEM Kolkata is as follows :-MBA - 2.3 Lakhs (1st Year Fees)For any further information you can visit the college website or contact the concerned department for the same.
faqs.question: What are the fees for MBA programmes at UEM Kolkata?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to the University of Engineering and Management, Jaipur can be said moderate to slightly competitive. Requirements are a minimum 45 margin in 10+2 (40 for SC/ST) and a valid JEE Main or RMAT score.Cut-offs: JEE Main scores range between 60-80 percentile, for RMAT, scores range from 40-60 percentile.Fees: INR 1,34,000 (Initial year) and INR 1,14,000 (Consolidated charges for the next years).Intake: Establishment of 300 seats for B.Tech., 120 seats for M.Tech.
faqs.question: Is University of Engineering and Management, Jaipur hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, for most of the courses provided at UEM Jaipur the canidates can get admission with 70% or below. UEM Jaipur offers a range of courses. Admission to the courses need the candidates need to have 45% to 60%.
faqs.question: Can I get into UEM Jaipur with 70% in class 12th?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College life is good, but not the college. So I suggest students do not think about it.

review_content.Placements: 85% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 7.2 LPA, but it's a pool drive. The lowest package is 3.6 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Deloitte is the top recruiting company for our course. 20% of students get internships in various unnamed companies. Roles like software development engineer, frontend developer, backend developer, and data analyst are offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: I would rate 3 stars out of 5 for the Wi-Fi, labs, and the library. I would rate 2 stars out of 5 for classrooms. It has big rooms. Food is okay. There are 3 canteen 1 for vegetarian and 2 for non-vegetarian food. Medical facilities are available, but very poor. Sports and games are there, but on an intermediate level.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and infrastructure, but some improvements are needed in the placement cell.

review_content.Placements: In my course almost all the students get placed by the college, and the highest package offered so far is 72 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are Cognizant, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini and Infosys. According to UEM Jaipur 95 to 99 percent of the students are placed in roles like software development engineer, data scientist and AI engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university has a well maintained campus with good facilities for students. Classrooms and labs are equipped with the necessary equipment and Wi-Fi is available though it could be improved. The hostel is decent but the mess food is average, however, the canteen offers better options. The sports facilities are really good at my college.

review_summary.college_name: UEM Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My own college, UEM, Jaipur.

content.Placements: Top companies are Kreeti Tech, CoreLogic, ProDesk, Michelin Technologies, these mainly recruit for software and data roles. Other than that, companies also hire for support and sales jobs, with a package of around 5-7 LPA. If you want an internship, you can go for an off-campus internship.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is quite good, with good food, and the rooms are pretty good, with good privacy and environment. Classrooms and labs are also very good, and library is also there, which you can access fully at any time, boys whole night, girls have different in their hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My own college is UEM Jaipur.

content.Placements: Placements are decent, average package of companies vary from 3 to 6 LPA depending on the role, like it goes high for Computer Science students, top companies are CoreLogic, Kreeti Technologies, you can also go for a sales job as various companies are hiring for this role.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is really very good, like the 3 rooms are too spacious, and also the Wi-Fi is very good, and the library is the best part, where there are plenty of books and its open 24/7, so you can visit and study. Food in the mess is decent, not too bad, you can eat.

content.Placements: 85% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 7.2 LPA, but it's a pool drive. The lowest package is 3.6 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. There are 3 canteen 1 for vegetarian and 2 for non-vegetarian food. Medical facilities are available, but very poor. Sports and games are there, but on an intermediate level.

The University offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate, and doctoral courses. The university accepts applications in the online mode. UEM Jaipur admission to all the courses offered at UEM Jaipur is based on entrance exam scores. Admission to the offered programme is done based on exams, including the IEMJEE exam, JEE Main, CAT, CET, etc Candidates also need to be eligible for the entrance exam.

admission_process.title: UEM Jaipur Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: UEM Jaipur Admission 2026is based on the entrance exam. The university accepts applications in the online mode. UEM Jaipur admission to all the courses offered at UEM Jaipur isentrance exam-basedfollowed by counselling. Admission to the offered programme is done based on exams, including the IEMJEE exam, JEE Main, CAT, CET, etc Candidates also need to be eligible for the entrance exam. Find below the Admission Process:
Step 1: Registration to IEMJEE exam

Candidates are required to visit the University's official website to apply for theIEMJEE exam, if they don't have a valid score from another entrance exam includingJEE Main, CAT, CET, etc. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria prescribed under the program eligibility.
Step 2: Check IEMJEE 2026 result

Results for IEMJEE are declared within a week from the closing date of the examination. Scorecards are issued online, by using a registration number. Merit list, which will be prepared by the concerned admission authorities, will carry the names of the students who have passed IEMJEE exam.
Step 3: Counselling
After declaration of IEMJEE result, the University would conduct the counseling round. All who wish to attend the counseling round must be present in person along with all of their documents.

In an interview with Shiksha.com, Vice-Chancellor of UEM Jaipur, Dr Biswajoy Chatterjee discusses the admissions procedure and the qualifying requirements that must be met in order to be admitted to one of the university's programs. The eligibility criteria for each program are course-specific, thus they differ.

placement_data.title: UEM Jaipur Placement Overview
paragraphs: UEM Jaipur is conducting its placements for the batch passing out in 2025. Till now, all students got at least one job offer from reputed recruiters. As per the latest report, 75% of students of the batch 2025 secured 2 job offers with handsome packages. 5 students have received 4 jobs , 8 students received 3 jobs , and 6 students have 5 job offers in hand during UEM Jaipur placements 2025. Earlier, UEM Jaipur recorded 100% placements for the Class of 2024 . The highest and average package offered during UEM Jaipur placements in 2024 was INR 72 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively . 80% of students of the batch 2024 secured 2 job offers with handsome packages. The top recruiters of the University of Engineering & Management (UEM), Jaipur, in 2024 and 2025 included Cognizant, Deloitte, McAfee, Capgemini, Infosys, TCS, PwC , etc.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at UEM Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The total fee for BTech at UEM Jaipur is INR 3 Lacs - INR 6.8 lakh. This is the tuition fee and not the total fee. The fee is exclusive of the transportation charges, and various other charges. This fee changes every year hence visit the official website for updated information.

faqs.question: What are the fees for MBA programmes at UEM Kolkata?
faqs.answer: UEM Kolkata is a private university established in 2015 and is approved by the AICTE, UGC, and the Bar Council of India. It offers various undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral-level courses across multiple streams. MBA is a two-year full-time dual specialisation course divided into four semesters.They also offers part-time MBA course. UEM Kolkata offers MBA in eight specialisations and is ranked #44 by Times 2023. The fees for MBA programmes at UEM Kolkata is as follows :- MBA - 2.3 Lakhs (1st Year Fees) For any further information you can visit the college website or contact the concerned department for the same.

faqs.question: How much does M.Tech at UEM Kolkata cost?
faqs.answer: Average Cost: The average cost per year for an M.Tech programme at UEM Kolkata is around INR 1,45,300 (one Lacs forty-five thousand three hundred rupees). University Website: The most reliable source for fee information is always the university's website. Specialization Fees: Some specializations within M.Tech might have slightly higher or lower fees than the average. Semester Fees: The fee structure might be presented on a per-semester basis. Multiply the semester fee by the number of semesters in the programme to get the total tuition cost.
