reviews.review_heading: My own college, UEM, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is quite good, with good food, and the rooms are pretty good, with good privacy and environment. Classrooms and labs are also very good, and library is also there, which you can access fully at any time, boys whole night, girls have different in their hostels.

reviews.review_heading: My own college is UEM Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is really very good, like the 3 rooms are too spacious, and also the Wi-Fi is very good, and the library is the best part, where there are plenty of books and its open 24/7, so you can visit and study. Food in the mess is decent, not too bad, you can eat.

reviews.review_heading: College life is good, but not the college. So I suggest students do not think about it.
reviews.review_text: I would rate 3 stars out of 5 for the Wi-Fi, labs, and the library. I would rate 2 stars out of 5 for classrooms. It has big rooms. Food is okay. There are 3 canteen 1 for vegetarian and 2 for non-vegetarian food. Medical facilities are available, but very poor. Sports and games are there, but on an intermediate level.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure, but some improvements are needed in the placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The university has a well maintained campus with good facilities for students. Classrooms and labs are equipped with the necessary equipment and Wi-Fi is available though it could be improved. The hostel is decent but the mess food is average, however, the canteen offers better options. The sports facilities are really good at my college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department are 24-hour Wi-Fi, labs are available for practical and practice, classrooms are fully lit and provide a very good environment. In the library, we can get all types of books and study materials.

reviews.review_heading: College is very much peaceful and it stands for its own motto that is good education good job.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available for us. We have hostel here. We have three hostels and three faculty members' quarters. We have football ground and cricket ground. We have 400 meter running track. We have two academic buildings. We also have a hospital and there are four canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Average engineering college in Rajasthan with affordable finance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, classrooms are average, and academic block has basic facilities. Wi-Fi is available but consistent. The equipments are good but some outdated. Library has a normal collection of books and average space. Overall, it is functional but nothing exceptional.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the good faculty members, placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: UEM offers a range of facilities and infrastructure, including a good library which is open 24x7. It has various sports facilities, cafeterias, a gym, medical facilities, and labs. The hostel facilities are also nice, and we can have AC rooms. The cleaning staff members are also good. The quality of food in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: UEM Jaipur offers excellent facilities and dedicated faculty.
reviews.review_text: The structures are well-maintained and visually appealing. Hospital services are available 24 hours, and the canteen remains open until 2 AM. Many sports grounds are accessible, including badminton, basketball, volleyball, an 800-meter race track, a football ground, and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a blend of academics and nature.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good. We have two labs, each with projectors, and one classroom also has a projector. It would have been great if every classroom had one. Our department also has a separate library. The mess food is average. Sports and games are very active. It has medical facilities, including emergency cars 24x7.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good in education and for placements.
reviews.review_text: For the BCA department specifically, we have well-equipped computer labs with updated software and hardware. Students get access to the latest versions of programming languages, development tools, and networking equipment necessary for practical learning. The labs are air-conditioned and maintained properly, providing a comfortable environment for extended coding sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure at our campus are truly outstanding. The modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and vast library resources provide an ideal learning environment. The hostel facilities are comfortable and clean, with delicious food options in mess and canteen. The medical and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best institute.
reviews.review_text: In our institute, all types of facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and also sports. Good quality hostel facilities and food. All types of food are available along with canteen and medical facilities. Games, all types of sports, and event facilities are also given.

reviews.review_heading: The college has an excellent environment to grow your mind and make a better life for yourself.
reviews.review_text: We have different labs available for different subjects. We do have a combined central lab with working machines. Wi-Fi is available in every part of our campus with good network speed. There are projectors available in all the classrooms with white boards.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, good lighting, and classrooms are available. It has a library, computer lab, and language lab. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good. Medical facilities are provided in the college. Sports are also conducted in the college.

paragraphs: UEM Jaipur offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. UEM Jaipur has achieved a significant milestone by distributing over INR 8 crores in scholarships to its students to date. Through various scholarship programmes, UEM Jaipur ensures that financial constraints do not hinder the various aspirations of talented individuals. By empowering students with financial support and also nurturing a culture of excellence, UEM Jaipur continues to shape the various future leaders and contribute to the nation's growth. The below-mentioned is the in-depth information about the UEM Jaipur scholarship:

The below-mentioned is the detailed information about the Scholarship for Programmes after 10+2:
The below-mentioned is the detailed information about the Scholarship for Programmes after Graduation:

Scholarships are limited. The mentioned percentages are the only eligibility to apply for the scholarships. Candidates getting above percentages must fill out the UEM Scholarship Application form. In the absence of the mark sheets, direct admission and scholarship applications will not be considered. The final decision lies with the Scholarship Committee.

The various scholarships are granted on a semester basis and continuation in the second and further semesters of the programme is subject to the scholarship policy. To continue availing of the various scholarships, students must have the same position in the merit lists as mentioned below:
The scholarships do not include Refundable Security Deposits/ Boarding and Lodging Costs.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: B.N.M Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for offline learning, students can choose from various streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, course available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is an exciting array of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. BNMIT fee structure ranges between INR 2,50,000 to 28,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates can only apply for UG courses at B.N.M Institute of Technology with Class 12 score. BNMIT offers BE at the UG level. The institute has not specified any minimum aggregate for BE programme. However, aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as optional subjects and English as a subject of study are eligible to apply for BE. Those seeking admission under the Management Quota need to secure at least 45% aggregate in Class 12. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply for the BE programme.
faqs.question: Can I apply at BNMIT with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants who have completed BE/ BTech with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST and Category I) are eligible to apply for M.Tech programme at B.N.M Institute of Technology. Besides, aspirants must also hold a valid score in Karnataka PGCET for admission to the course. Candidates should have relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for M.Tech at BNMIT?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed Pre-University Examination (Science) conducted by Karnataka State Pre-University Board or Class 12 School Programme of the Central Board (CBSE / ICSE) New Delhi with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as optional subjects and English as a subject of study are eligible to apply for the BE programme at B.N.M Institute of Technology.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BE at BNMIT?

faqs.answer: Admission to BNM Institute of Technology's MBA program wouldn't be considered 'easy'.BNMIT accepts the MAT, CAT, PGCET, and other equivalent entrance exams for MBA admission. Apply online for the course on the portal of the institute. Those who have completed their academic work with a minimum of 50% are qualified to apply for this course. The written entrance exam is required of eligible candidates, and those who pass will be invited to a group discussion and/or personal interview, depending on their entrance exam results. Counseling appointments will be extended to the shortlisted candidates in accordance with their entrance exam score and rank. Based on their performance in the group discussion and personal interview as well as their entrance exam score, candidates are chosen.

admission_process.title: BNMIT Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BNMIT admissionsare currently open. Candidates can get admission based on their entrance exam score in the preferred programme. The institute also offers admission through Management Quota. Such candidates need to directly fill out the application form. Below are the steps to get a seat in BNMIT:
Step 1: BNMIT Application Process 2025

There is a separate application process for courses. Candidates seeking admission in MBA or through Management Quota have to apply on the institute's website. For courses such as BE and MTech, aspirants need to register for KCET or COMEDK and Karnataka PGCET, respectively. BE aspirants may also need to apply on the institute's website. Candidates shall submit his /her application for registration to the University in the prescribed form along with other necessary documents for PhD and MSc by Research programmes.
Step 2: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates for MBA based on their KMAT or Karnataka PGCET scores. The selection for BE programme is based on COMEDK or KCET scores of the candidates. For MTech, aspirants must have a valid score in Karnataka PGCET. Those aspirants who wish to get admission through the Management Quota are offered seats directly based on their merit.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

BE and ME aspirants who have appeared for the accepted entrance exams are required to participate in KCET/ COMEDK Counselling and PGCET Counselling respectively. Candidates are offered seats based on their rank. Further, aspirants of all courses have to report at the campus for document verification. Candidates need to confirm their seat by paying theBNMIT fee.
Below are the documents required for UG and PG admissions:

The cutoff of CSE saw a declining trend from 8660 in 2022,  9008 in 2023 to 13679 in 2024.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at BNMIT?
faqs.answer: B.N.M. Institute of Technology offers seats to candidates based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants are first required to register and appear for any of the accepted entrance exams. The institute considers KCET/ COMEDK for BE, PGCET for ME and KMAT/ Karnataka PGCET for MBA programmes. Candidates have to further participate in counselling by respective exam-conducting bodies. Aspirants who are allotted seat in the institute need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What is the last date for admission at BNM Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The deadline for admission at BNM Institute of Technology (BNMIT) varies according to the programme you are interested in.B.Tech (BE) Programs The KCET 2024 applications are presently open, and the deadline to register for the exam is February 10,  2024. Application costs can be paid through February 14,  2024.Non-Karnataka candidates can apply for BE/BArch admissions using their COMEDK-UGET 2024 score. The COMEDK-UGET 2024 application can be completed online between February 1 and April 5,  2024.KCET 2024 will take place on April 18 and 19,  2024. COMEDK-UGET 2024 will take place on May 12,  2024.The deadline to register for the MBA programme is February 10,  2024. Application costs can be paid through February 14,  2024.

hostel_campus.college_name: BNM Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is very beautiful. We have supportive staff members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel environment is very good. The food served is superb. coming to the Wi-Fi, we will get the network easily and quickly. Our college is good at sports.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics, supportive faculty members, decent placements, and limited campus space.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well spaced classrooms with good benches. Digital boards are there in every classroom. Laboratory has enough computers. Washrooms are neat and clean. It provides good drinking water facility. Best food and snacks are available in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Best supportive college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, there are labs, a library, a smart board & AC in every classroom. There is also a well-maintained canteen with fresh and tasty food available at a very reasonable price. The library is particularly for post-graduation, offering a variety of books.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and infrastructure of the college are extremely good.
reviews.review_text: Almost all faculty members have done their PhDs. Labs, libraries, and classrooms are very well-maintained and very clean. The library has a wide number of books for students. The quantity also is really good. There is also a digital library for which students can make use to study and do their research work with college-provided internet. The hostel is good, clean, and tidy. But the food is really bad. This is a major drawback of BNMIT. Sports and extracurricular activities are also given a lot ...

reviews.review_heading: Moderate experience with room for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course was average, with basic facilities like labs and Wi-Fi only provided in labs. A library was also available, but they were not always maintained or up to date. The hostel facilities provided were also very poor, and the canteen food had limited options with average taste.

reviews.review_heading: Review by 1st Year Student.
reviews.review_text: Don't know about the hostels, but the canteen is good. Infrastructure is also good; classrooms are decent, labs are well-maintained, and the library is also good with a good variety of books. The reason I gave 3 stars is that the ground is as big as a kindergarten ground, with very little space and fewer sports facilities. The auditorium and seminar hall are damn good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and really good crowd.
reviews.review_text: We do have wifi for the hostel, and we'll have infrastructure labs and classrooms. The canteen is maintained neatly and properly. We have a volleyball court, a basketball court, table tennis, and a badminton court. Mess food is great, and they're well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, decent placements, but not so good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: For college, the infrastructure is not generally liked by students due to being situated near residential areas and also having a very small campus area. Also, labs are decent but they are not that well maintained and all the components may not work so exhanging and all is generally done. Classrooms are decent for mostly all blocks. The hostel is fine but the fees are higher than at nearby PGs and hygiene is not maintained that much.

reviews.review_heading: A Student's hub for knowledge .
reviews.review_text: The only con is the size of the campus; apart from that, the boys hostel is quite far away from the college. Regarding infrastructure, the labs and library are top-notch and way more than sufficient for high progress in learning. Wi-Fi is provided throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A small world with maximum inputs and outputs but the students get slightly tourchered by lectures.
reviews.review_text: BNM Institute of Technology has an average campus with multi- utility infrastructure. There is a Wi-Fi support and the labs are well-equipped. The hostel facilities, food facilities, medical services along with the sports activities are below satisfactory levels.

reviews.review_heading: Good opportunity for students to excel in their careers.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered are enough to get through with all four year of the course. Exams are taken on Samsung Tabs and all labs have internet connections and working systems. Classrooms are spacious and the library provides both online and offline materials. The girls hostel is within the campus itself which is safe and the boys hostel is a few kms away. The food is manageable and medical facilities are also provided. The canteen has good Indian meals along with chaats for snack breaks. Badminto...

reviews.review_heading: BNMIT is the rising star among colleges in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Our college provides Wi-Fi for study purposes. Labs are well-equipped. All classrooms are smart. The library has many books. The hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.N.M Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small. It is spread over 4 acres of land. The hostel is not on campus. The hostel is good. It provides good food. It has a clean environment. The hostel staff is good. Our canteen is small. It provides healthy and clean food.

reviews.review_heading: Bnmit- Amazing for placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. Proper facilities for studying and extracurricular is provided. Wi-Fi is easily accessible through the campus. Classrooms are wide and spacious. Library is super informative. The canteen food is tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best education.
reviews.review_text: We have amazing facilities. We have very good hostel facilities. It is the most comfortable girls' hostel on the college campus, but the boys' hostel is at another place. Wi-Fi is available. A washing machine is available. Security is provided 24X7.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about B.N.M Institute of Technology

likes.text: The companies which visited and took E&C students were Mentor Graphics, Microsoft, Accenture, Cognizant, IBM, Infosys, HCL and TCS.
The training and placement department of the college provides you proper guidance to get industry ready.

college_info.college_name: BNM Institute of Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, B.N.M Institute of Technology offers scholarships to economically weaker section. A scholarship of INR 10,000 to INR 25,000 is offered to rural students from economically weaker section admitted through CET. Students must hold relevant documents to prove their claim during the verification process.

For MBA admission at BNMIT, the institute accepts the MAT/CAT/PGCET or other comparable entrance exams. Apply for the course online through the institute's web portal. The KMAT application form fee is INR 856 and may be paid by DD for general-category students. Graduates with at least 50% marks in academics are eligible to apply for the course. Students admitted via CAT will pay the cost listed below. Candidates will also be charged additional costs for varied entry admissions. This is because fewer seats will be given for the management quota, resulting in a greater cost than usual.
As per the latest news,  Programs and Fee Details for Management Quota 2024-2025 as shown:MBA     (3,50,000+75,000) yearly

The yearly tuition fee for MBA at B.N.M Institute of Technology is INR 4 lakh. The fee excludes other components such as application fee, library fee, registration & prospectus fee, student welfare and Insurance, etc. Aspirants need to pay some part of the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute.

Yes, scholarships are available for undergraduate (UG) studies at BNM Institute of Technology. BNMIT Bangalore provides scholarships to deserving and economically underprivileged students, rural/children, farmers, and other groups. These scholarships might total up to Rs 50 Lacs every year.BNMIT offers a Rs. 25,000 merit grant to students with CET scores below 1000.

faqs.answer: A:    One month is not sufficient for JEE Main preparation if a student has not started preparing or have not studied earlier for the exam. As the syllabus of JEE Main is vast, studying all the topics and remembering them take a lot of effort. However, class 12 student can get a decent score in JEE Main if time after the bard exam is devoted exclusively for the JEE preparation. Since most topics of JEE Main and class 12 are similar, students need to revise all the topics and solve previous year JEE Main question papers. Start solving JEE Main mock test papers at last 3-4 days before the exam to make yourself comfortable with the exam.
faqs.question: Is one month sufficient for JEE Main preparation?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes JEE Mains exam will help you in getting admission at Quantum University. There are two ways to get admission at Quantum University. One is on the basis of Q-care entrance exam and other is on the basis of marks secured in 12th board examination. If you have scored 70-90% in your 12th you will be awarded scholarship when taking admission here. If you have scored more than 90% marks in your 12th grade, then you will get a 100% scholarship on the tuition fee in the first year in all courses.

review_summary.college_name: Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.

content.Placements: In this course, at least 70% of students get placed from my point of view. The highest package I have ever heard is 35 LPA. The average package is 5.8 LPA. The lowest is 3 LPA as per I know. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, Flipkart, Byjus, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the one thing that I love here. They provided a library. Many labs for different subjects. They also provided us the Wi-Fi in the library. Classrooms are also in very good condition. There is every single thing that a classroom needs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The life of quantum School of Technology, Roorkee.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed. The highest package is 60 LPA. I don't know about the lowest package. Top recruiting companies are Byjus Amazon, and many more well-known companies. Other than that many students got internships. I am still a fresher and the top roles are web developer and application developer.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in the library as compared to classrooms. Classrooms have good tables and benches but no air conditioning facilities on campus. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is average. I don't know about the medical facilities but they have very good facilities for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is number 1 college at North Indian Quantum University.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students are placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Flipkart, Quick Heal, Tech Mahindra, Byjus, etc. Almost 80% of students get internships in Amazon, Flipkart, Byjus, Quick Heel, etc. Top roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratory, library, gaming room, classrooms, gym, and many other facilities are available in this course. Hostel facilities are very good. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are provided in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college that is improving day by day and soon become the best college in North India.

content.Placements: There is 100% placement in the CSE branch and in other branches, it is about 70-80%. This year, the highest salary package offered was 22 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 8 LPA to 9 LPA. Quick Heal, TCS, Zebronics, etc., are the top recruiters of our college.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled. It is on 33 acres. We have well-maintain labs, neat and clean classrooms. The mess and rooms in hostel are also clean. For medical emergencies, there is always an ambulance on campus. Every month, we have a sports tournament for the hostel students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Completely satisfied and I'm happy with the college.

content.Placements: I got placed in Hettich, India which is one of the reputed in its industry. Our college and the placement department provides full support for the students to deliver the best. The faculty and staff members are supportive and provide you complete freedom in exams.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Here, we have everything from Wi-Fi to the playground. I'm completely satisfied with everything. I got placed in Hettich, India and must say I'm satisfied with our college placement programme. The college gives you the best.

admission_process.title: Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The admission proces for Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) can be completed online. Students need to go through application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students who are interested in joining the institute can follow the steps below to complete theQuantum School of Technology (Admission Office) admission process:
Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) Application Process 2026

The admission process starts with filling Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) course admissions application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website to apply for the course of their choice along with making an application fee for the respective courses.
Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) Selection Process 2026

The selection process at Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) is merit + entrance-based. Students need to submit scores of the last qualifying exams (Class 12 for UG & Graduation for PG admissions).

Students also need to appear for the Q-CARE exam - which is an entrance-cum-scholarship exam. Students can also submit valid scores of national-level exams, such as JEE Main (BTech) or CAT/ XAT for MBA. For more course-wise selection procedures students can visit the official website.
Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) Admission Confirmation 2026
After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) Fees 2026

Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) fee structureincludes tuition fee, library fee, caution deposit, and more. Some of these are charged only once. The remaining need to be paid as per the university's guidelines. Students can pay the fee through debit card/ credit card/ UPI/ NET Banking. Refer to the table below to know about theQuantum School of Technology (Admission Office) fees:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and can change.

courses_data.description: At the UG level, Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office), Quantum University offers a four year BTech programme. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria set by Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office), Quantum University with a valid score in JEE Main exam can apply.Quantum School of Technology (Admission Office) admission criteriafor BTech are entrance-based score acceptance, i.e., JEE Mains. Students can pursue the course in specialisations, such asCSE, Cyber Security & Digital Forensics,Civil Engineering, ECE, etc. The minimum qualification required is to pass Class 12 with PCM subjects and a minimum aggregate of 50%.

faqs.question: How to get admission at Quantum University? Is qualifying JEE Mains required or does it have any other qualification exams?
faqs.answer: Yes JEE Mains exam will help you in getting admission at Quantum University. There are two ways to get admission at Quantum University. One is on the basis of Q-care entrance exam and other is on the basis of marks secured in 12th board examination. If you have scored 70-90% in your 12th you will be awarded scholarship when taking admission here. If you have scored more than 90% marks in your 12th grade, then you will get a 100% scholarship on the tuition fee in the first year in all courses.

The cafeteria is open every day and offers a variety of drinks and snacks between scheduled meals.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the one thing that I love here. They provided a library. Many labs for different subjects. They also provided us the Wi-Fi in the library. Classrooms are also in very good condition. There is every single thing that a classroom needs.

reviews.review_heading: The life of quantum School of Technology, Roorkee.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in the library as compared to classrooms. Classrooms have good tables and benches but no air conditioning facilities on campus. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is average. I don't know about the medical facilities but they have very good facilities for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is number 1 college at North Indian Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratory, library, gaming room, classrooms, gym, and many other facilities are available in this course. Hostel facilities are very good. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that is improving day by day and soon become the best college in North India.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled. It is on 33 acres. We have well-maintain labs, neat and clean classrooms. The mess and rooms in hostel are also clean. For medical emergencies, there is always an ambulance on campus. Every month, we have a sports tournament for the hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfied and I'm happy with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Here, we have everything from Wi-Fi to the playground. I'm completely satisfied with everything. I got placed in Hettich, India and must say I'm satisfied with our college placement programme. The college gives you the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but the administration is not good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are good. The library always helps us in providing books. Classrooms are neat and clean with an energetic atmosphere. Sometimes, the food in the canteen is not good, but it is okay. Hostel rooms are very small in size, and students feel uncomfortable in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college surroundings, facilities and placements are all satisfactory but not as expected.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities such as separate hostels, football ground, basketball court, tennis court but are not maintained at all. There are neither proper sports office nor any coaches. The internet is provided all over the hostel but doesn't have satisfactory speed. The labs for all the branches are provided. The quality of food at the mess is good. Hostel rooms are good with power backup.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum school of technology is a great place for every student to pursue higher studies.
reviews.review_text: There is a free Wi-Fi for campus students, and also has transportation facilities. The college celebrates yearly functions. Many students won in Quantum and having to go-kart for national vehicle testings. The college has good environmental libraries.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect place for study in computer science and IT course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and there is lots of space for studying, and there is lots of space in the library too. The sports ground is also a part of the college. There are cricket ground, football, tennis, basketball, badminton court in the college. There are lots of classrooms for students. There are a big auditorium and 2 conference halls for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college in Uttarakhand, got an excellence award.
reviews.review_text: In this college, many facilities are available here. An auditorium with a seating capacity of 550 with central AC, cafe, library, hostel facility for outside state students. Clean and hygiene mess is available for hostel students. The bus facility is available for day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: Above average college, but placements area needs a special attention.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good (one of the best parts of it). The hostel is equipped with a lift which is generally not found even in higher educational institutes. Greenery is kind of a concern but if the overall infrastructure is a matter, it will not lack in that area for sure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members,good infrastructure and easy accessibility.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is very good and well ventilated. The building is also very well planned. All the rooms are good and properly made. 
It has an easily accessible structure and separate wings for courses.
There are separate cabins for faculty members of different courses. There is a badminton court, cricket ground, football ground, basketball court and all other sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of their rules and regulations.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is there but only for hostellers but not during college timings (9 to 5). As we were the first batch of mechatronics engineering so there was no lab of the pure mechatronics setups like hydraulics lab, PLC, etc. Classrooms, library, sports and games were good, but the medical facilities like college ambulance mostly used for dropping food, LPG cylinders, etc. for the college mess. 
Coming to the quality of labs and classrooms, I'll give 7 out of 10 but chairs were not available for the who...

Everyone is supportive in the college. Faculty is too nice. I tried to approach teachers outside the college and they were very helpful, cleared all my doubts. The classrooms are well equipped and have modern laboratories. The environment in and around the Roorkee is too pleasant. Everyone is supportive in the college. Faculty is too nice. I tried to approach teachers outside the college and they were very helpful, cleared all my doubts. The classrooms are well equipped and have modern laboratories. The environment in and around the Roorkee is too pleasant.

The college has an excellent hostel and sports facility. Placement are sure for students with average standard especially for M.E, C.S, civil and E.E. The faculty here is good and supportive. Teaching is done with modern method like power point presentation and practical view experimentation. The college has an excellent hostel and sports facility. Placement are sure for students with average standard especially for M.E, C.S, civil and E.E. The faculty here is good and supportive. Teaching is done with modern method like power point presentation and practical view experimentation.

review_content.Placements: Nearby 70-80% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tetra Pak, Atlas Copco, and Triveni Turbine visit the college to hire students. There are many roles for students, like mech designer, production manager, etc.

Medical services are available. The sports facilities are great, and I got a good experience. So I prefer students join this college in Solapur.

The highest package of our college is 11 Lacs per year, and the average package is between 3 to 4 Lacs per year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Walchand Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: The companies offered by the college are pretty decent. The highest on-campus package of 9 LPA. A minimum on-campus package of 3 LPA. The study culture is pretty good compared to other colleges. The coding culture is decent. There are different roles offered during placement which include technical and nontechnical too.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good with full Wi-Fi equipped. Classrooms are also equipped with projectors. The library is the main attraction of the college. There is one canteen with fast food available during college timings. According to me, this college hostel is the best among its competitors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Walchand Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: The average package offered is around 4 LPA to 5 LPA, and placements are up to the mark. As expected, students should be skilled, and skilled candidates are placed here. Companies like IBM, Amazon, Byju's, and Flipkart have visited the campus. Additionally, TCS and Infosys have provided me with internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided is outstanding, with a huge campus and Wi-Fi available throughout. We have a large library, and the book lending scheme is open to all. The hostel is also good and is located near the college, allowing students to reach campus on time. The mess is located within the hostel campus, so there’s no worry about food, and its quality is up to the mark.

admission_process.title: Walchand Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Walchand Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in stream includingEngineering.Walchand Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and MHT CET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,54,782 - 3,94,784for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

description: Walchand Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Walchand Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Walchand Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 93248 and 288860 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 93248, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 66809.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 93248.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.
The Last Round closing score for BTech ranged between 97.13 and 56.75, among which B.E. in Computer Engineering was the most competitive specialisation, followed by B.E. in Information Technology.

As per the Walchand Institute of Technology cutoff 2023, the Round 1 and the Last Round closing scores for B.E. in Computer Engineering were 90.81 and 97.13, respectively for the General Home State category candidates.

During Walchand Institute of Technology cutoff 2023, the last round closing score was 88.75 for B.E. in Electrical Engineering course. In 2022 and 2021, the last round closing scores stood at 88.24 and 91.9, respectively for B.E. in Electrical Engineering. Considering the Round 3 closing scores for B.E. in Electrical Engineering over the past three years, Walchand Institute of Technology has witnessed a fluctuating trend.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET are given below for Walchand Institute of Technology BTech admission:

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top three most competitive specialisations were M.E. in Electronics Engineering, followed by M.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering, and M.Tech. in Designer Engineering, with the cutoff being 11.67, 9.74 and 9.33, respectively.
See the table below for more such comparisons about other categories in different rounds and years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Walchand Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Walchand Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with full Wi-Fi equipped. Classrooms are also equipped with projectors. The library is the main attraction of the college. There is one canteen with fast food available during college timings. According to me, this college hostel is the best among its competitors.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Walchand Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided is outstanding, with a huge campus and Wi-Fi available throughout. We have a large library, and the book lending scheme is open to all. The hostel is also good and is located near the college, allowing students to reach campus on time. The mess is located within the hostel campus, so there’s no worry about food, and its quality is up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Dynamic learning environment with engaging campus life and promising career prospects.
reviews.review_text: The course facilities are excellent with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a vast library. Hostel facilities are good, and the food is decent. Medical services are available. The sports facilities are great, and I got a good experience. So I prefer students join this college in Solapur.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for engineering. So, there are very few negative points to notice.
reviews.review_text: As our college is one of the oldest colleges in my city, Solapur, the facilities in our college are good enough. It has many labs for experiments as well as for every branch of the college. The canteen is available, but it is pretty good and provides the right kind of yummy snacks.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is very nice and good for placement, teaching quality, sports, etc.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library, which is very good and big. We also have an art exhibition and digital classrooms, and we have a workshop as well. I did not join the hostel, but the canteen is good, and we have a very big ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: My engineering life is in Walchand Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel has two types: one is a 4-seater, and one is a 2-seater. The cost of the 4-seater is 22,000, and the cost of the 2-seater is 32,000. There is a mess inside the hostel, and the cost of the mess is 2,600 per month. The mess food is better than average, and hostel security is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Students life at WIT Solapur.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure, with separate buildings for mechanical, civil, electronics, and computer engineering. There is a dedicated library building that has nearly four floors and houses more than 1,000 books.

reviews.review_heading: Best autonomous college in Solapur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is quite old, and new hostels are under construction. The hostel is fully accommodated with 2-3 seaters. The food is good, and Jains may have different food. The hostel provides paid Wi-Fi services. The library is large and has many books. The classrooms are also big in size.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is very good and all facilities are good. So if you wish, you can take admission.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities are very good. The systems are newly installed. All the labs are good enough. 
The hostel is in two parts: one is a four-seater and one is a two-seater, where the water and electricity are available all the time. Mess is also available at a reasonable price. Food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, and the hostel is also nice. The classrooms are good, and almost 200 students can sit in one classroom. There are also projectors, which help with  modern teaching methodologies. The labs are well-maintained and in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Absoluetly satisfied,good infrastructure and campus and faculty is good
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is really great and hostels are also clean. The food at the hostel mess are also really good. Every Saturday or Sunday there is a special menu for the hostellers and the cleanliness around the hostel premises and the college premises also really good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements are available for studious students.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-fi is available only for the computers and they are connected via LAN. Classrooms are good for studying and they have separate buildings for libraries, so you can imagine their quality. 
The college also encourages sports and events and the mess and canteen are mediocre.

reviews.review_heading: If you want good knowledge and skills, then this college is perfect for you.
reviews.review_text:
In my views , faculties are good above average because they always support us. The infrastructure of our classroom , library, etc., is on average. 
So in our hostel ,food is so hygienic and healthy. As this college is working for the Jain minority , both Jain and non-Jain food is available in our mess.
And medical facilities , sports, and games are quite average in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Walchand Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good we are provided with the good and library ground for to play football and cricket; separate basketball court and volleyball court; the classrooms wear modern and use projector; the hostel is also good with good ambience; the food is also good, not that great in test; the water quality is also good cleaning is done once per week and room checking is done once per month.

reviews.review_heading: An autonomous institute.
reviews.review_text: This college has highly qualified and experienced faculty and technical staff. The campus is networked and Wi-Fi enabled. The institute is supported by a very good sports facility that includes an eight-lane athletic track, football, volleyball, and cricket grounds. The institute has a canteen and hostels for boys and girls with Wi-Fi and other utilities.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Walchand Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, IBM, Accenture, Ugam solutions, Hexaware and many more.
The college is totally good, and the modern teachers are very talented and mature; therefore, many students are placed in very good companies.

college_info.intro: NIST Berhampur popular programmes are BTech and BSc. The aim of NIST Berhampur is to transfer knowledge through its state-of-the-art professionalised training and quality education, which is based on a well-defined curriculum. This curriculum aligns with the growing demands of the industry. NIST Berhampur BTech students are placed in top organisations, namely Axis Bank, TCS, PwC, Flipkart, Infosys, and others. BTech and BSc students can also join non-technical fields such as Marketing, Sales, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the National Institute of Science and Technology Berhampur, and their respective eligibility and NIST Berhampur fee structure:

At the UG level, NIST offers BTech, BSc, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the NIST offers MBA, MTech, and other courses to students. BTech is provided in 9 specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. Other fee components included in the total fee are hostel fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. It must be noted that the fee amount is based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive faculty, good events, and the best placements for CSE students.

review_content.Placements: At NIST University, Berhampur, the placement infrastructure and prospects are above average among many private engineering colleges in the region. With effort, you can secure a decent job. However, if your ambition is for top-tier tech companies with very high salary packages, you should not rely solely on the placement cell. You will need to proactively build your skills and perhaps be ready for off-campus efforts too.
review_content.Infrastructure: You will find a good, comfortable campus with solid infrastructure and decent hostel life. It provides you with new blocks/rooms and doesn't expect ultra-luxury. With moderate expectations, it delivers well. Hostel facilities are fairly decent. It provides rooms for 4-5 students, sometimes AC/non-AC options, Wi-Fi in hostels, and reliable water/electricity.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities for students.

review_content.Placements: Up to 80% of the students from our senior batch were placed in the year 2024. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra and TCS (Tata Consultancy Services). The highest package was 23 lakhs in the year 2019, and the lowest was 6.3 lakhs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel environment is so good. You can look out for a clear and clean view from the courtyard outside the room. It looks like a green field. The Wi-Fi system is moderate to average. Classrooms and labs also have good infrastructure. Mess food is also good, with no remnants from previous days. For sports and games, you can choose the indoor stadium as the best place, even if it is raining or during a thunderstorm, because it has good facilities for games like volleyball, table tennis, badminton, and kabaddi.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech at NIST Berhampur?
overview_faqs.answer: NIST Berhampur BTech tuition fee ranges between INR 4.28 lakh and INR 6.48 lakh. The exact fee amount varies across the BTech specialisations available at the institute. The following table presents the specialisation-wise BTech at NIST:NIST BTech SpecialisationsBTech Fee for Four YearsComputer Science & EngineeringComputer Science & TechnologyInformation TechnologyComputer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science)INR 7.02 lakhElectronics and Communication EngineeringINR 6.58 lakhCivil EngineeringElectrical EngineeringElectrical & Electronics EngineeringMechanical EngineeringINR 5.10 lakhNOTE: The fee amount is based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: NIST Berhampur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: We get to experience a campus designed to support innovation, learning, and holistic growth.

content.Placements: We have a good number of students in our batch. More than 60 percent of batch students got placed through campus, and the other 40 percent of students signed up to not opt for campus placements. The average package offered is 5 LPA, and the highest package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. TCS is the top recruiter in our batch, followed by Tech Mahindra and Infosys, too. From our batch, a lot of students opted for medium-sized IT firms in Bhubaneswar and Hyderabad for internship opportunities. Roles like business development executive and SDE are offered.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This is good for everything a student wants to do.

content.Placements: I don't know about the placements because as I am in 1st year, I only know the things which are above. The highest package is 23 LPA, and I saw many of recruiters are coming here for the selection, and students are selecting. There are many companies which are recruiting here.
content.Infrastructure: It is not bad like the other colleges and the best for Odisha. The course infrastructure is so manually stabilized for easy access of the students for study. The campus is surrounded by its own Wi-Fi network. A separate indoor stadium is there where students get their passion.

individual_reviews.title: Take admission only if you have money constraints, unless you avoid it.

content.Placements: About 35%-40% of 2021-2025 batch got placed, with the highest package of 23 LPA, the lowest of 1.8 LPA, and an average of 3 LPA-3.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Tech Mahindra, Mysa, Texas Instruments, HP, Infosys, and other small services-based companies. Our college is not known for internship opportunities, so there are probably 10%-20% internships. The hiring is mainly for development and data analytics.
content.Infrastructure: For computer systems that are outdated with a lower than 3rd-generation Intel. Infrastructure is below average compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi is the only thing that is faster than other colleges. For hostel, the infrastructure is below average and has worse toilets. Mess is average as compared to other private colleges, canteen is only available during the day. There is a medical facility on campus and one in the hostel with an ambulance facility. For sports, we have an indoor stadium which has probably all the games, and with an occasional opening, a swimming pool.

admission_overview.college_name: NIST Berhampur Course Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Selection, Application Process

admission_process.title: NIST Berhampur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NIST Berhampur admission 2025 is open for the academic year 2025-26. The institute offers various UG and PG courses. The admission to NIST Berhampur courses is merit as well as entrance-based. Candidates can apply for admission to their course of choice through the official website ofNIST Berhampur. Check out the table below for admission highlights of the NIST Berhampur:
Particulars
NIST Berhampur Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
https://nist.edu/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to NIST Berhampur courses is based on a valid score obtained by the candidates in the qualifying exams along with other selection rounds for the respective course. Admission to all the courses offered by NIST Berhampur is subject to merit in the entrance exam, personal interview, group discussion, and past academics. The following table mentions eligibility and selection criteria for all programmes
Know more aboutNIST Berhampur courses

The admission process for NIST Berhampur is a multi-step process is inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification. A step-by-step process that students need to follow is as follows:
1. NIST Berhampur Online Registration

For registration, candidates need to submit the entrance exam score for the respective test they have appeared for admission to different courses. The entrance exam scorecards have to be submitted at the time of registration.2. NIST Berhampur Application Form
Interested candidates have to fill out the NIST Berhampur application form 2025 online. After checking the eligibility, candidates can fill out the form on the official website of NIST Berhampur.
3. NIST Berhampur Shortlisting

The selection process of NIST Berhampur includes an examination of candidates based on their aspirations, and experiences. The admission panel will also evaluate the candidates based on their academic accomplishments during the interview stages of the selection process.
4. NIST Berhampur Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates shortlisted as per the course eligibility & selection rounds will have to submit the prescribed admission fee. Following this, candidates are required to go through the document verification and are intimated about the date of commencement of the classes.

faqs.question: Do I need OJEE score to get into NIST for MBA?

placement_data.title: NIST Berhampur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NIST University conducts rigorous Pre-Placement Training Programs for the B.Tech , MCA, M.Tech , MBA students throughout the academic year to make them Industry-ready. The Training and Placement Cell assists the faculty members to provide certification courses during summer vacation at NIST campus on industry oriented courses such as VLSI, Oracle, J2EE, Industrial Automation, SAP, Embedded Systems, Foreign Language (e.g., Japanese).

During NIST University placements 2025 over 280 offers were extended to students.According to the data collected as of March 28, 2025, over 82 recruiters participated in the placement season. The highest package offered at NIST University placements reached INR 23 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the amount of fee payable for B.Tech admission at NIST Berhampur?
faqs.answer: At the time of admission to the BTech programme of NIST Berhampur, selected candidates have to pay an admission seat confirmation fee and a refundable caution deposit. The admission seat confirmation fee at NIST is INR 15,000. The fee amount is later adjusted toward the first instalment of the total BTech fee, which ranges between INR 4.28 lakh and INR 6.48 lakh for four years. Additionally, students must submit a caution deposit of INR 5,000 which will be refunded to them after the completion of the programme. It must be noted that the fee amount is based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BSc at NIST Berhampur?
faqs.answer: NIST Berhampur BSc tuition fee ranges between INR 1.3 Lacs and INR 1.5 lakh. This is just the tuition fee payable over the course duration of three years. Other fee components included in the total fee are hostel fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. It must be noted that the fee amount is based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews.review_heading: We get to experience a campus designed to support innovation, learning, and holistic growth.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and mess are good. Both boys' and girls' hostels are there, but not co-ed. Wi-Fi is there, and its usage is good. For the mess and hostel, we have to pay an additional deposit, which is refundable at the end of the semester. The quality of food is average but manageable. We have a basketball court too.

reviews.review_heading: This is good for everything a student wants to do.
reviews.review_text: It is not bad like the other colleges and the best for Odisha. The course infrastructure is so manually stabilized for easy access of the students for study. The campus is surrounded by its own Wi-Fi network. A separate indoor stadium is there where students get their passion.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, good events, and the best placements for CSE students.
reviews.review_text: You will find a good, comfortable campus with solid infrastructure and decent hostel life. It provides you with new blocks/rooms and doesn't expect ultra-luxury. With moderate expectations, it delivers well. Hostel facilities are fairly decent. It provides rooms for 4-5 students, sometimes AC/non-AC options, Wi-Fi in hostels, and reliable water/electricity.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel environment is so good. You can look out for a clear and clean view from the courtyard outside the room. It looks like a green field. The Wi-Fi system is moderate to average. Classrooms and labs also have good infrastructure. Mess food is also good, with no remnants from previous days. For sports and games, you can choose the indoor stadium as the best place, even if it is raining or during a thunderstorm, because it has good facilities for games like volleyball, table tennis, badmint...

reviews.review_heading: Take admission only if you have money constraints, unless you avoid it.
reviews.review_text: For computer systems that are outdated with a lower than 3rd-generation Intel. Infrastructure is below average compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi is the only thing that is faster than other colleges. For hostel, the infrastructure is below average and has worse toilets. Mess is average as compared to other private colleges, canteen is only available during the day. There is a medical facility on campus and one in the hostel with an ambulance facility. For sports, we have an indoor stadium which h...

reviews.review_heading: My advice is to do admission anywhere else but not here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connections are good on campus. Labs are air-conditioned. Classrooms are not that much good. Library is good. In hostel, the rooms are good. But the food is the worst. Medical facilities are good. Sports are very good, and you also get opportunities. The mess and canteen food are not healthy.

reviews.review_heading: NIST University - The place for leaders.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is fabulous. Hostel facilities are also good but there is a little compromise in food. Wi-Fi facility and AC rooms are available. We can see average rooms and also moderate food. Best in quantity but lacks in quality. Good for localities.

reviews.review_heading: I love this college. It is better than my expectations.
reviews.review_text: I am a CSE Student and I love the infrastructure of NIST. The Wi-Fi system is good. Labs are good. We have a huge library on our campus. Mess food is more than expected. We also have a canteen, and we can get quality food at a low price. We have also an indoor stadium on our campus, A big cricket ground is available outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It's all about my college, which has good nature and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classes are very good. Labs have AC and very good equipment that is required for the particular subject. The lab teachers are also good and very friendly. Talking about the hostel facility, it is also good. You will get both AC and non-AC rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good, and the campus is also good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and library facilities are available in our college. The library system is good. Sometimes, Wi-Fi doesn't work good. Classrooms are also good. The mess is also good. There are two types of hostels A/C and non-A/C. Sports facilities are not that type. There is an indoor stadium on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: There is good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my college include Wi-Fi, a café, a ground, a swimming pool, a gym, a stadium, labs, libraries, etc. The food quality provided in my college is very good and affordable, just like a home-cooked meal. I love it.

reviews.review_heading: NIST University: A place to make your dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is great. It is well-equipped with all the required and market trends as well as basic technology. The quality of food is great, with all need diets. The hostel provides a great meal for students. Medical facilities are basic, but they are enough for a college.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The college Wi-Fi facility is available. Many high-facility labs are available,  with a large library. The hostel food is good. Students from other colleges come here to play. The hostel is very good and clean, and the mess is also good. The mess food is tasty, and there are also some hotels within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Nist University is perfect.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good campus, labs, classrooms, and free Wi-Fi. The classrooms are smart classrooms and the labs are good. They provide good practical work for understanding things. In nist there medical facilities are good. On the NIST campus, there is Indore Stadium outer stadium cricket ground sankalp ground, and many gardens.

reviews.review_heading: A good return on investment.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls are well-ventilated. AC is not required but some new lecture halls have AC. There is a central mess (The Octagon) which also has a library on top. Campus is Wi-Fi equipped. We have dedicated labs for various courses. There are two hostels for boys and one for girls. Some rooms have AC but they are limited. Every hostel has a mess and there are also places to eat around the hostel or outside the entrance gate. There is an on-campus medical facility. Campus is also equipped with a sw...

paragraphs: At the time of admission to the BTech programme of NIST Berhampur, selected candidates have to pay an admission seat confirmation fee and a refundable caution deposit. The admission seat confirmation fee at NIST is INR 15,000. The fee amount is later adjusted toward the first instalment of the total BTech fee, which ranges between INR 4.28 lakh and INR 6.48 lakh for four years. Additionally, students must submit a caution deposit of INR 5,000 which will be refunded to them after the completion of the programme. It must be noted that the fee amount is based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

NIST Berhampur BSc tuition fee ranges between INR 1.3 Lacs and INR 1.5 lakh. This is just the tuition fee payable over the course duration of three years. Other fee components included in the total fee are hostel fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. It must be noted that the fee amount is based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

NIST Berhampur has kept the fee quite affordable. Hence, the fee does not seem expensive. Even if the students feel that the fee is expensive, worry not, students can apply for the scholarships. Some of the scholarships provided by the NIST are mentioned below:

reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life with scope for curriculum update.

review_content.Placements: Around 80 to 85% of Computer Engineering Students at RAIT, Navi Mumbai, are placed annually through campus drives. The highest package is 32 LPA, with an average of 6 to 8 LPA and a minimum of 3 to 4 LPA. Recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture, LTI, JP Morgan, Barclays, Amdocs, and occasionally Microsoft, Amazon, and Oracle. About 70% secure internships via campus, alumni, or startups, gaining practical exposure. Common roles include Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Web Developer, and Cloud Engineer. Festivals like Horizons and societies like IEEE enrich student life, blending academics, exposure, and campus vibrancy.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent of the students get placed and those 10 percent are students who are not academically inclined. Average placement lies around 7 LPA-10 LPA. Higher ends of placement lie around 16 LPA-17 LPA. Over 65 percent of students got internships. Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, Bosch, L&T Infotech, Deloitte, Barclays, JP Morgan Chase, Morgan Stanley and Zensar. Roles offered are data analyst, IT consultant, Database engineer, software engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure with modern, air-conditioned classrooms and clean washrooms. Labs are well-equipped for practical learning and the library offers a wide range of academic resources. Overall, the campus is clean, organized and student-friendly.

reviews_list.review_title: RAIT is one of the best colleges, and I am currently studying here. I'm a proud RAITian.

review_content.Placements: In RAIT, there is 100% placement. Every student gets the opportunity to work in their dream job. The highest package offered is 43 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA across all fields. The most in-demand fields are AIML, Data Science, Cybersecurity, and core IT branches. Nearly 100% of students get internships at various companies like Deloitte, Amazon, and Google Pay.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every facility is provided to every student, with delicious mess food on time. RAIT is very clean compared to others. There is 24/7 electricity. The labs are equipped with multiple ACs, and classrooms have digital boards to make learning faster and easier to understand.

admission_overview.college_name: Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Eligibility, Exams, Application Process

admission_process.title: Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Theadmissionis based on merit and entrance depending on the course. It is a constituent institute ofDY Patil Deemed to be University, Navi Mumbai.RAIT, Navi Mumbai offers various Engineering programmes at UG, PG and PhD levels through its five departments, namely theDepartment of Computer Science, Department of Information Technology, Department of Electronics & Telecommunication, Department of ElectronicsandDepartment of Instrumentation.Candidates can visit RAIT's official website and apply online for admission. Interested students can read the following article to learn more about the courses. eligibility, fees, and admission procedures of various programmes offered.

Theadmissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. Candidates must ensure to meet the minimum eligibility criteria before applying to any of the BTech, MTech and PhD programmes. Students can pursue the courses across several specialisations. The institute accepts various national and state-level entrance exams for shortlisting students. The assessment process of RAIT usually runs for 2-10 working days. The table below presentsRamarao Adik Institute of Technology courses, along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised board
DYPRAIT-ET/JEE Main/MHTCETscores
BE/ BTech degree from a recognised university
DYPRAIT PG /GATEscores
MTech/ ME degree from a recognised university
UGC-NET/CSIR NET/ SLET /GATEscores

The total tuition fees are inclusive of several components some of which need to be paid only once at the time of admission. The other components can be paid semesterly or year-wise as per the institute's guidelines. The fee ranges betweenINR 20,000andINR 22 lakhdepends on the course and specialisation selected by the students. When it comes to affordability, the programmes can be quite expensive. Aspirants can check out the following table to learn aboutRAIT Navi Mumbai feesand average package for popular programmes:
Total Tuition Fees (Investment)
Average Package (Return)

Ramarao Adik Institute of Technology offers a limited number of seats for its programmes. Students must pay the admission fees to secure their seats at the institute. The seat intake depends on the course and specialisation the students select. Interested candidates can check out the following table to know about theRAIT Navi Mumbai seat intake:

The admission is entrance-based. The admission process is conducted in both online and offline modes. It is a multi-step process that involves application, selection, and admission confirmation. The applications usually begin in January of every year. Students can check out the steps below to complete theadmission process:
Students fulfilling the eligibility criteria can visit the official website of Ramarao Adik Institute of Technology and fill the online application form by paying the application fee.

The institute scrutinises the applications and shortlists the candidates based on several parameters, including their performance in the GDPI rounds. Selected candidates are contacted for further procedures.
For those shortlisted provisionally, the institute may conduct further selection rounds. Selected students need to pay the admission fees for final admission confirmation.

faqs.question: Can I get a BTech seat at Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology without appearing for JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can get a Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology BTech seat without appearing for the JEE Main exam. As per the institute's admission policy, the institute accepts various national-level entrance test scores for admission to its BTech courses. These exams are the Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT), MHT-CET (PCM), and DYPRAIT-ET. Thus, students who couldn't appear for the JEE Main exam can apply via scores obtained in any one of the aforementioned tests.

faqs.answer: Yes, Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology does provide a refund of fees in case a student wishes to withdraw his/her admission.
