hostel_campus.college_name: Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has great placement and modern infrastructure with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: For the academic or department side, the facilities are very good in terms of modernity and breadth. The hostel and student life ancillary facilities are good overall; you'll find comfortable accommodation, modern amenities, and sports/leisure infrastructure. However, based on reviews, the mess food and hostel location/pricing may have some room for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: This is all about DY Patil University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with modern projection and audio systems. University has specialized labs such as apple lab, IoT lab, weather direction system, many more hi-tech machines, and lab available. There is no need to worry about DY Patil food and other essential facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life with scope for curriculum update.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Engineering department at RAIT, Navi Mumbai, has modern labs like Mac and Siemens labs, updated hardware/software for AI, ML, and Cybersecurity, spacious AC classrooms, and a resourceful central library. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and shares with DY Patil University broader facilities like a gym, playgrounds, and reliable medical access with DY Patil Hospital nearby. Hostel facilities exist mainly for girls but are costly, while boys prefer PGs, mess food gets mixed reviews. Sports...

reviews.review_heading: A great pick in the Navi Mumbai region, this college actually values skills over grades.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure with modern, air-conditioned classrooms and clean washrooms. Labs are well-equipped for practical learning and the library offers a wide range of academic resources. Overall, the campus is clean, organized and student-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: RAIT is one of the best colleges, and I am currently studying here. I'm a proud RAITian.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is provided to every student, with delicious mess food on time. RAIT is very clean compared to others. There is 24/7 electricity. The labs are equipped with multiple ACs, and classrooms have digital boards to make learning faster and easier to understand.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college more than anything.
reviews.review_text: I have seen the hostel and the infrastructure is quite vast and big. There are 3 hostels one for boys and one for girls. There is a hostel for both in the same building named Centre of Excellence and their girls hostel is right below the boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is advanced in infrastructure and decent in placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Library, canteen, high tech, and advanced labs based on trending domains like Apple lab, Robotics lab, intel unnati lab, Blockchain lab, etc., are available. Students can work in these labs by obtaining permission. Few classrooms don't have AC which I feel isn't worth paying so much fees.

reviews.review_heading: A short review about DY Patil University, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has Wi-Fi in all labs and on all floors; they have smart boards of the latest technology and have a big library where students can study and take books for their knowledge. The hostel fee for 1 year is 3 lakh, so it's on you to have a hostel or take a PG nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Drive into the world of RAIT.
reviews.review_text: Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology provides great infrastructure and labs are quite good. College has built labs like Intel, Siemens, Apple, robotics, data science, cybersecurity, etc. We can avail hostel through the university office itself.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology, Padmashree Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text:
There are multiple specialized labs for all subjects & domains, like cyber security labs, big data analytics labs, blockchain labs, robotics labs, and cloud labs. 
Hostels are good but little expensive foods are of premium quality. There are 4-5 canteens on campus and offer a wide range of dishes. Sport's & medical facilities are also available, as DY Patil Hospital is inside the campus only.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology, Padmashree Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful. The whole campus is spread over 72 acres of land. The hostel is expensive and worthy. The canteen in the engineering department is not good compared to other canteens. They didn't allow engineering students to go into the other canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with great campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are mostly adequate, but most don't have air conditioning. The faculty are average. There is no Wi-Fi for students, and the labs are sufficient. The library is well stocked with books for both academic and general purposes.

reviews.review_heading: RAIT review - good college overall, huge campus but average placements.
reviews.review_text: Every lab has AC, library has AC and it's spacious. Not every classroom has AC, and labs are well-equipped. Sports are highly encouraged too. I don't know about the quality of food. Hostel facility is available for girls only and not boys. Boys have to look for PGs.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: All the infrastructure is best. All labs contains required instruments in good condition, and the lab assistant helps you in everything. Mostly every classroom is air-conditioned, except some classrooms. library is very big and contains all sorts of study books. Also, it is best place to study. Canteen food is not so good; you will find better food outside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review for Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is just top-notch, as the campus itself is too big and has a stadium itself and 2 different grounds for practice. In the RAIT building, we almost have 8–9 labs, including the Mac Lab, and more new labs are coming, such as the SIEMENS lab and much more.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: HKBK College of Engineering provides courses, including BE/BTech, MBA, BBA, BCA, and BCom, among others, at the UG and PG levels. These programmes are offered in the streams of Engineering, Management, Commerce and Computer Applications. HKBK course fees vary based on the duration and the level of the course. Admission to a few courses is entrance-based. Candidates interested in taking admission can apply on the official website. Some of the institute's popular courses, eligibility criteria and fees are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    The HKBK College of Engineering tuition fee for BSc courses is INR 2.5 lakh for a course duration of three years. This fee has been sourced from the official website of the university. However, it is still subject to changes. Hence, it is indicative. Other than this, students are required to pay INR 15,000 as ‘Other’ fees. Students who wish to live in on-campus hostels may have to pay extra.
faqs.question: What is the fees of HKBK College of Engineering for BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the Management Aptitude Test (MAT) is accepted for admission at Bangalore's HKBK College of Engineering. Additionally, the college accepts scores from the KMAT, CAT, GMAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, UCEED, Uni-Guage, CSIR, UGC NET, JRF, KPGCET, JET, and JEE entrance exams.After counseling, admission to HKBK College of Engineering is determined by performance on entrance tests.Students must have at least 50% in a pertinent Bachelor's programme in order to be admitted to an MBA program.Additionally, they need to pass the PGCET entrance exam.
faqs.question: Is MAT required for HKBK College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    The total cost to pursue BSc courses from HKBK College of Engineering is a combination of all the fee components to be paid by the students to complete the program. As per the fee structure, students are mainly charged with three components: tuition fees, hostel fees, and a one-time fee. Combining all, the total fees for the BSc programme is INR 2.65 lakh. overview_faqs.question: Does HKBK College of Engineering provide a fee refund if I wish to cancel my BCom admission?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the college does provide a refund if a student wishes to cancel the admission. Listed below are the guidelines as per the fee refund policy of HKBK:If a student cancels the admission before the start of the course, the entire fee is refunded after the deduction of the processing fee of no more than INR 1,000.In case a student leaves after joining the course, and if the seat is filled by another student before the last date of admission, then a refund of the entire fee after a deduction of the processing fee of no more than INR 1,000 will be provided.Note: The above information has been sourced from official sources. admission_process.title: HKBK College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HKBK College of Engineering admission 2025is open. HKBK College is affiliated with Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU). The institute offers various degree programmes at the UG, PG and doctoral levels. Programmes offered atHKBK College of Engineeringare in streams including, Engineering, Business & Management, Software & IT and Accounting and Commerce. HKBK College of Engineering admission to its BTech, MBA, and PhD courses is based on scores of entrance exams. For BTech admission,KCET/JEEscores are expected. For MBA admission, KMAT/ CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ XAT scores are expected. Candidates can apply online or offline for admission.

Candidates interested in getting into HKBK College of Engineering are required to follow the JEE Main/KCET/KMAT/ CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ XAT exam and HKBK College of Engineering application process. Check out the below table for details onHKBK College of Engineering course admissionwhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:
Eligibility

JEE Main/KCET

HKBK College of Engineering course admissions 2025 for all of its courses is based on entrance exams. Check below the complete HKBK College of Engineering admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:Appear for the entrance examsJEE Main/KCET/KMAT/CAT/MAT/GMAT/XATand appear for the college-based selection rounds and then wait for the release of their resultsAdmission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: I have scored 70 percentile in CAT. Do I have any chance for HKBK College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can enroll in a reputable management programme with a CAT score between 70 and 80 percentile.HKBK Group of Institutions requires a minimum of 60 percentile in KMAT/CAT/MAT/GMAT/XAT for their MBA program. Other eligibility criteria include:A graduation degree in any stream from a recognised institute/university with a minimum of 50% aggregateA Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalentTier-2 and Tier-3 MBA colleges accept CAT percentile in the range of 60-

faqs.question: How can I check the merit list in HKBK College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: You can view the HKBK College of Engineering's merit list by visiting the college's official website. Typically, the website provides information on admission and merit lists. Go to the college's website and look for the "Admission 2023" section. You may probably find updates on merit lists and admission-related information here. You can get in touch with the college's admissions office or the designated admissions contact person if you are having problems finding the merit list on the website.

The unique feature of the MBA programme isDual specialisation.The MBA programme offered at HKBKCE isaffiliated with VTU and approved by AICTE. faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA at HKBK College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Eligible candidate? will have to work hard for HKBK College of Engineering MBA admission and should be a graduate with minimum 50% marks. You need to write? some exams like KMAT, CAT, MAT, XAT. From? there, navigate the college selection process. When? selected, pay fees and submit the papers.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in HKBK College of Engineering for MBA?
faqs.answer: Direct admission to MBA at HKBK College of Engineering is not typically available without an entrance exam. You need to have a valid score in KMAT, CAT, MAT, GMAT, or XAT. Admission is granted based on merit and selection process. Management quota may have different criteria.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does HKBK College of Engineering accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: HKBK College of Engineering in Bangalore accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to its MBA program: KMAT, CAT, MAT, GMAT, XAT.Candidates must also have a minimum of 50% aggregate in a relevant bachelor's program. They must also score at least 60 percentile in the entrance exams.HKBK College of Engineering also considers scores from national level exams like:Karnataka College Entrance Test (KCET)Joint Entrance Examination (JEE)GATE

faqs.question: Are there any seat reservations at HKBK College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: HKBK offers 10% seat reservations for the Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) of society. It also offers 15% reservations for the Non-Regional Indians (NRIs) and Foreign students. It also offers direct admission for students who have completed their 10+2 from a recognised board.  Apart from that, only KCET is a criteria.

placement_data.title: HKBK College of Engineering Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The HKBK College of Engineering has released the placements for 2025. The highest package offered stands at INR 31.4 LPA . The season witnessed 1100 offers in total. Additionally, 618 students got placed. Further, 242 recruiters took part in the placement drive and the top recruiters include- IBM, Amazon, Google etc made into the list at HKBK College of Engineering placements 2025.

As per the official website, the highest package offered during earlier placements stood at INR 32.4 LPA . The placement rate recorded was 93.3% and more than 250 companies took part during the placements. The highest internship stipend was INR 42 Thousand per month .

faqs.question: How is the placement at HKBK College of Engineering for B.Sc?
faqs.answer: For students wanting to pursue a BSc, HKBK College of Engineering offers two specialisations, namely Cyber Forensics and Computer Science. During the three-year course duration, students gain knowledge about different facets of Cyber Security. After completing their BSc degree, students can seek out job opportunities with titles such as Forensic Auditor, Forensic Scientist, Fraud Analyst, Laboratory Analysts and more. The students can expect a starting salary in the range of INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA. With knowledge and skill enhancement, students can grow their salaries. The growth of each student may vary depending on factors such as skill set, competency, market demand, etc.

facilities: Indoor gym, badminton court, and more for recreational activities

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for your future.
reviews.review_text: We will get good food at the college hostel, and the food is good in taste. Room sharing is only 2, and there is always Wi-Fi facility. We can enjoy the atmosphere in the college hostel and in class. The rooms have large televisions to teach and more fans.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college is big and well-maintained, with facilities, classrooms, and buildings. Wi-Fi is available in the college. The library is well-maintained and updated from time to time. Smart boards are used to teach students. The hostel rooms are big in size, and a study table is available for 2 people sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Average for all placements, infrastructure, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classroom and infrastructure facilities are good. I have heard that hostel food is not good. I mean, it has an average taste. Facilities available are a library, sports equipment, a changing room for both boys and girls, a prayer room, a hostel, and different labs of computer, electronics, Chemistry, Physics, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: College building is very big in size. Wi-Fi, gym, big size library, classrooms, and labs are well-maintained and updated from time to time. 2 sharing hostel rooms with study table and 24/7 electricity are there. Mess and canteen are hygienic and variety of food are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-maintained and updated from time to time. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Hostel sports teams are there, and hostel sports are played. Medical facilities are available in the college. Mess and canteen are in hygienic conditions, and good food is available.

reviews.review_heading: College journey with lots of memories with friends in college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available at the college are average. Labs are equipped with good systems with average Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are good with accommodation for 60 students at a time for classes. College has central library and departmental libraries. Food quality is average in the canteen, maintenance is okay. Hostel with boys' gym is available and also encourages students for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I prefer don't take admission at this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classroom are well but hostel facility is not worth for money. Annual sports and games will be conducted every year. But there is no big sports ground. Campus is full of institutional buildings. No sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome to the campus of engineering .
reviews.review_text: The library and classrooms are spacious, and the labs are well-maintained and updated regularly. Wi-Fi is available for students, and there are medical facilities on campus. The quality of food is good and nutritious, and sports are played at both college and state levels.

reviews.review_heading: Top 10 college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college is very big, and the boys' hostel is inside the campus. Wi-Fi is available in the college. The mess and canteen are hygienic, and a variety of food is available. Sports are played at the state level. Medical facilities are available in the college, and labs are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: 24/7 free internet is available in the college. Labs are well maintained, and classrooms are very big enough with smart boards. The library is very big in the college and is a quiet place to read. Food is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: It has a full AC labs. There is a free Wi-Fi for students. We can go to the library. All the facilities are available in the college. The canteen is good. The hostel mess is also good. Sports are played. A big ground is there to play cricket, football, volleyball and basketball. A gym is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HKBK College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: It was a huge campus, with good infrastructure and good hostels for both boys and girls, separate hostels. The Electronics and Communication Engineering department had well-equipped labs for VLSI, embedded systems, and communication systems, along with smart classrooms and campus-wide Wi-Fi. The library offered extensive academic resources, including books, journals, and e-resources. Hostel facilities were decent, with clean shared rooms, good Wi-Fi, and regular maintenance. The mess food was sa...

reviews.review_heading: The college is highly ranked and the best for new comes.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the college from the library to Wi-Fi, etc. We get a variety of food in the canteen. Sports are given priority. Medical facilities are available. Doctors and national sports are played. The training is provided from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, with greenery all over the campus. The hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HKBK College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, with every classroom equipped with a smart board. Students from different branches are organised into four blocks, labeled A to D. The hostel facilities are decent and can cost approximately Rs. 90,000 per year. The college features a small cafeteria and a spacious food court that offers a variety of food options, including parathas, kebabs, and biryani (available on Fridays), among others.

paragraphs: The HKBK College of Engineering tuition fee for BSc courses is INR 2.5 lakh for a course duration of three years. This fee has been sourced from the official website of the university. However, it is still subject to changes. Hence, it is indicative. Other than this, students are required to pay INR 15,000 as ‘Other’ fees. Students who wish to live in on-campus hostels may have to pay extra.

The total cost to pursue BSc courses from HKBK College of Engineering is a combination of all the fee components to be paid by the students to complete the program. As per the fee structure, students are mainly charged with three components: tuition fees, hostel fees, and a one-time fee. Combining all, the total fees for the BSc programme is INR 2.65 lakh. review_summary.college_name: Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the facility and faculty of the college.

content.Placements: There are various roles offered. The average package is between 3 LPA and 4 LPA. Not very great, but a decent college based on placement records. If you are hardworking enough, you will find a decent package as the placement and training department is quite good, and many companies visit the college for in-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and the library are 10/10. You will find the most supportive teachers and facilities here. The hostel is also very good. The food is average, neither very bad nor very good, except for the food part, everything else is very good. 50 percent of students are from Bihar, but students from other states and nations are also here.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the crowd, but facilities and opportunities are good.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placements for law at the moment, but other technical and non-technical job offers are available. Internships are common, our department makes sure every student interns while on semester break. Almost everyone gets an internship at courts, offices, and law firms.
content.Infrastructure: So, we have a full-fledged central library with all the books, specifically for law, we have another law library. There is a moot court hall for all the competitions and spacious, well-developed classrooms. The canteen only provides readymade things to eat; no food is cooked there.

admission_overview.college_name: Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Fee, Application, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is mainly held online and is based on entrance test scores.Shobhit Universityaccepts various national-level entrance test, like CAT, CUET, etc. Also the university conducts its own entrance exam, known as SUNET for admissions. To know more about the courses, admission criteria, and the entire admission process, read on:

Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology deemed to be a university provides a wide range of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels, in the fields of Engineering, Science, Technology, Management, Law, Commerce,etc. Students can also pursue distance and online courses at the university. Refer to the following table to know about the key admission highlights of the university:
Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Distance/ Online
Programmes offered
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma
Popular programmes
BTech| MBA| BSc

Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology course admissionis a blend of entrance and merit basis. The university accepts applications through online mode. It is important that the candidates fulfil the preset admission criteria before proceeding with admission. Students can either provide valid scores obtained in any of the accepted tests or appear for the university's own entrance test. However, meeting the minimum qualification requirement is also mandatory. Interested candidates can take a look at the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forShobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology courses:

The admission process for the Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology consists of multiple steps, such as the application process, entrance exam, shortlisting, and admission confirmation. Candidates must go through the entire process to get admission into the institute. Eligible students can follow the steps explained below to completeShobhit University admission process:
1. Application Process
Visit the official website of the institute and apply for the desired programme by filling out the application form and paying the required fees.
2. Selection Rounds

The university selects candidates based on several parameters.Shobhit University admission criteriavary depending on the course selected by the candidates. The university mostly selects candidates based on valid entrance exam scores. Hence, candidates must either provide a valid score obtained in any of the accepted test or appear for the university-level entrance test (SUNET). Applicants may get a call to appear for GDPI for MBA admission.
3.Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, candidates need to go through document verification and pay the university's admission fees for seat confirmation.

placement_data.title: Shobhit University Placements Overview 2024
paragraphs: Shobhit University has a University Training Development Center (UTDC) whose aim is to enhance the employability & life skills of the students to enable them to confidently launch their professional journey. The University invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placed students also get the opportunity to do their final project in the placed company as an interns with a stipend at this phase. After successful completion of the internship, the students can get full-time employment.

Shobhit University concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with 90% placements . As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Shobhit University placements in 2024 stood at INR 23 LPA . Further, over 500 recruiters participated in 2024 placements and offered various new-age jobs to the students of the 2024 batch. The top recruiters of Shobhit University in 2024 included Alcatel Lucent, Accord Communications, Aon Hewitt, Biocon, Biotech Park, BPL, BOSCH, Capgemini, Cognizant, Ericsson, Essel Shyam, HCL, IBM, etc.
Note : The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data discussed above is assumed for the year 2024 .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facility and faculty of the college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are 10/10. You will find the most supportive teachers and facilities here. The hostel is also very good. The food is average, neither very bad nor very good, except for the food part, everything else is very good. 50 percent of students are from Bihar, but students from other states and nations are also here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the crowd, but facilities and opportunities are good.
reviews.review_text: So, we have a full-fledged central library with all the books, specifically for law, we have another law library. There is a moot court hall for all the competitions and spacious, well-developed classrooms. The canteen only provides readymade things to eat; no food is cooked there.

reviews.review_heading: Experience with supportive faculty members and practical curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college has specific teachers for each subject. There is a lab, Wi-Fi, and digital boards in the classrooms. There is a library. There is a mess and canteen for food and lunch. There are medical facilities, and sports also take place from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Experience with supportive faculty and practical curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college has specific teachers for each subject, a lab, Wi-Fi, and digital boards in classrooms. There is a library, a mess, and canteens for food and lunch. Medical facilities are available, and sports also take place from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Experience with supportive faculty, and practical curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college has specific teachers for each subject. There is a lab, Wi-Fi, and digital boards in the classrooms. There is a library. There is a mess and canteens for food and lunch. There are medical facilities, and sports also take place from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology is good for B.Tech students.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure in our B.Tech CSE course. Wi-Fi, computer labs, chemistry lab, physics lab, communication lab, and good classrooms with smart boards are available. The library is also accessible to all students. The food in the mess is average, but the medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also happen in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Demerits of getting into the college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is poor as they don't have separate rooms, and all are non-AC, which makes them poorer with its mess food. The infrastructure is also very small. This university has many departments within the same occupying small space, and as small space is given to departments, not many facilities are included. Only one library is available, having time limits when it opens.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of our college are very decent. 56 Wi-Fi connections are always available to access. The main attraction is our labs with different operation systems and different software to use. Classrooms are spacious with wooden furniture, projectors, and large whiteboards. Library facility is also top-notch. Library is available from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM. It has also collaborated with NDLI so students are requested to update their details on NDLI, which is very useful whenever we don't find anythi...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about Shobhit University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi and internet are provided in every corner of the university campus. Classrooms are very clean and in a decent environment, and a library is also available on the university campus. If we talk about hostel life, then the hostel life is average, and the quality of food is below average. Sports facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Excel Yourself at Shobhit Institute of Engineering and Technology, Meerut
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, 2/3-seater rooms with Wi-Fi are available and hostel facilities are good, but the mess is like all other universities—less than expected. For the hostel, you will also get gym facilities, and if you don't want to take the hostel, then outside the university, PG and rooms are available at a very cheap price, like 2-3k per month (food excluding).

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very supportive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is very good, and the students live there like family. The warden is also very supportive, and Wi-Fi is also provided in the hostel. All rooms are neat and clean, and the canteen is also very nice. There are a variety of items in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: This university is good for pursuing BBA.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities provided by the hostel, like a play ground for cricket, a good gym for the physical health of the students, and other sports like football, volleyball, and basketball, all of which are provided for the students on campus. Overall, the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: This university is a good option for pursuing BCA students, from my point of view.
reviews.review_text: The hostel on campus is very good, and it has gym facilities for the hostel students. There are also cricket grounds available for the game. Basketball and football are also played on campus. A Wi-Fi connection is available on campus and in the hostel, too. Overall, the infrastructure is in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the hostel and campus is good at the university.
reviews.review_text: I have loved the hostel on campus because the infrastructure is very good, the warden sir is very supportive in every work, the rooms are cleaned every day, and Wi-Fi connection is also provided in the hostel. In the mess, the food is of average quality, but like other mess, it is good. The canteen is also good on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. All departments have a library. Wi-Fi facility is available in our classrooms. The hostel is good. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7. They provide medical facilities. The food served in the mess is good. The canteen is good. I would recommend joining the hostel.

The average salary package offered to MCA graduates is 4.5 LPA. The university has a good placement record, and all top MNCs visit the campus for recruitment.
faqs.question: How are the placements of MCA in Sandip University, Nashik?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sandip University Nashik provides placement support to its students. Placement training programs and industry-specific sessions are conducted from the first year in all courses.
faqs.question: Does Sandip University, Nashik offer any placement support?

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University Nashik offers internships to students. The monthly stipend offered to students is usually around INR 15,000.
faqs.question: Does Sandip University offer Internships?

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University Nashik provides 100% placement assistance to its students. The University also conducts placement training programs.
faqs.question: What is the placement rate recorded during Sandip University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The Sandip University BSc eligibility criteria differs based on choice of specialisation. Listed below is the course-wise eligibility criteria:BSc in Physics: Passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and 40 % & 45% aggregate percentage for reserved category and general category, respectivelyBSc Microbiology/Forensic Science: Passed Class 12 in Science or equivalent course from any recognised board with a minimum 45% marks for open and 40% marks for backward category students. Students with a three-year Diploma from any recognised Board of Technical Education or its equivalent are also eligible to applyBSc in Chemistry: Passed Class 12 with Chemistry as compulsory subject and 40% & 45% aggregate percentage for reserved category and general categoryBSc in Computational Mathematics & Data Science: Class 12 with Mathematics as compulsory subject and 40% & 45% aggregate percentage for reserved category and general category, respectively

review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. review_summary.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many reputed companies came here. More than 80 percent of students were placed last year from my course. The highest package was not disclosed yet, and recruiting companies like IBM, Infosys, Accenture, etc., came here for recruitment and got a good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very awesome at Sandip University. It is located in Nashik, and the climate is very good. It always rains there. The hostel is good; there are 4-sharing rooms, and 2-sharing rooms are also available. There are also 4 messes. Veg and non-veg options are available here.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, balanced law and management course, good facilities, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: The BBA LLB (Hons) course at Sandip University offers decent placement opportunities. Around 65-75% of students get placed each year. The highest package ranges from 7 LPA to 8 LPA, the lowest is around 3 LPA, and the average stands at 4.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiters include corporate firms like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, as well as law firms and consulting companies like Deloitte and KPMG. Nearly 80-90% of students secure internships in courts, law firms, NGOs, and corporate houses. Common roles offered are legal associate, corporate legal executive, compliance analyst, HR or business analyst, and litigation intern, ensuring a diverse career path.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is moderately good, with average-quality education.

content.Placements: Only 15% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 8.4 LPA, the lowest is 2.4 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Mahindra and Tata Motors. Only 20% of students got internships. The top roles include mechanical engineering designer.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All the above is true, and you can take admission if you want to.

content.Placements: The pass students are placed. 3-4 students got placed in last year. The highest package is 50 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. There are many companies like Bosch, Mahindra, Infosys, etc. Around 30 to 40 students are placed in my college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available for our course department is very good. The infrastructure is very well-maintained. There are labs, libraries, and ground. Quality of food and other facilities is available. Overall, it is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are really helpful, good, qualified, and knowledgeable. They provide little bite quality. It makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are not that much difficult. But the proper guidance and proper study can beat it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Sandip University- Gate way of dream life.

content.Placements: Placements are good. They have a job fair for everyone. Where students across all cities are called. Multiple companies come here. Apart from job fairs, there are campus placements twice a year. Also, they provide internships to know the industry well. Also, students are asked to give mock interviews in college.
content.Infrastructure: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure. Huge campus of 274 acres which can accommodate large crowds. Overall there are too many facilities on campus. Sports complex which has football ground, cricket ground, and badminton court with basketball and tennis court. It also has multiple canteens and food courts.

admission_overview.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Sandip University, Nashik Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sandip University Nashik admissions are mostly entrance-based. The university offers various courses at the UG, PG and Diploma levels. The courses are offered in full-time as well as part-time mode through the different schools of Sandip University. Admission to Sandip University courses is entrance-based. For admission to Sandip University MBA needs to appear for CAT/ XAT/ MAT or any state CET or Sandip University Joint Entrance test (SU JEE- MBA). Sandip University BTech admissions are done through SUJ-JEE/ MH-CET/ JEE Mains. Read the following article to know about the admissions process of Sandip University, Nashik.

eligibility_selection.title: Sandip University, Nashik Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sandip University course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students seeking admission to Sandip University courses must check the eligibility criteria before applying. For UG admissions, Class 12 is required and graduation is needed for PG admissions. The table below has eligibility and selection for Sandip University Courses:

admission_process.title: Sandip University, Nashik Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Sandip University admission process starts with online application form filling followed by qualifying for the selection rounds. The application process can be completed online. Interested students can check below the steps ofSandip University admission process:
Sandip University Application Process
Candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college. To be eligible to apply, candidates are required to fill out the criteria set by the college.
Sandip UniversitySelection Round

Sandip University selects candidates for some UG and PG courses based on some entrance exams accepted by the college. The college accepts CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ SU JEE/ JEE Mains/ MH CET/GATE/ SUN- GATE and others for admission to MBA, BTech and MTech, respectively. Additionally, for other courses, the college offers merit-based admission.
Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the required fee within the given deadline to secure their seats.
For more details about Admission Process of Sandip University check out the below video:

faqs.question: When do admissions begin at Sandip University, Nashik?
faqs.answer: The Admission At Sandip University begin after 31 May each year. The Admission procedure is as follows:Enter your full Name as mentioned on the SSC result along with your registered mobile number.In the next section include the appropriate Personal details.In the “Program details” section ensure that you include proper options for the highest Qualification, Select School, Course Stream and Admission Year.Fill all the required “Education Details” as per your Qualification.Upload all the required scanned documents such as SSC, HSC & Graduation result. The Documents are accepted in PDF Format only.Proceed for your online payment to complete the payment.After successful payment, you will receive the confirmation of provisional registration details on your registered email and phone no.

placement_data.title: Sandip University Nashik Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Sandid University provides placement support to students across all disciplines including Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, Law and more. The University starts the placement training process from the first academic year itself. Students enroll in value added programs and take certifications in areas such as Aptitude, Communication and programming Languages. Sandip University Nashik conducts specialised training such as mock interviews, industry-specific sessions and group discussions.
According to the latest available data, the overall highest and average package recorded during Sandip University Nashik placements 2025 was INR 112 LPA and 12 LPA .

faqs.question: How many companies visit the campus during Sandip University placements?
faqs.answer: More than 250 companies visited the campus during Sandip University Nashik placements 2025.

faqs.question: Does Sandip University Nashik offer international placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sandip University Nashik offers international placements. The highest international package offered in 2025 was INR 112 LPA. The University also offers internship in countries such as Russia, Dubai and Germany.

faqs.question: What career prospects can I expect after completing B.Sc from Sandip University?
faqs.answer: Completing the Sandip University BSc course can lead to various career prospects in different domains and industries. Students with good academics can get into research. Students with a hold on practical aspects can look for jobs such as Data Engineer, Lab Technician, Data Aanalyst, and more. In general, fresh BSc graduates can expect to start with a salary ranging from INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA. Moreover, students must note that prospective career choices and expected salary also depend on students' skill sets and competencies.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very awesome at Sandip University. It is located in Nashik, and the climate is very good. It always rains there. The hostel is good; there are 4-sharing rooms, and 2-sharing rooms are also available. There are also 4 messes. Veg and non-veg options are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, balanced law and management course, good facilities, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Sandip University offers Wi-Fi classrooms, a moot court hall, and a well-stocked library with legal databases. Hostels are Wi-Fi-enabled with decent mess food. The campus has 24x7 medical aid, a canteen, sports facilities, and a gym, ensuring a student-friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is moderately good, with average-quality education.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

reviews.review_heading: All the above is true, and you can take admission if you want to.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available for our course department is very good. The infrastructure is very well-maintained. There are labs, libraries, and ground. Quality of food and other facilities is available. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University- Gate way of dream life.
reviews.review_text: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure. Huge campus of 274 acres which can accommodate large crowds. Overall there are too many facilities on campus. Sports complex which has football ground, cricket ground, and badminton court with basketball and tennis court. It also has multiple canteens and food courts.

reviews.review_heading: Better for middle-class families and others as well.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is average. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also average.  Ambulance is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: College is budget-friendly, and also satisfied with faculty and infrastructure of college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are excellent. Classrooms consist of good board view space, Wi-Fi, and all digital-based classrooms. Presence of a central library full of course books and non-course books. A digital library is also included in the central library. Labs are very comfortable and have good machines and materials to perform experiments. Coming to the food, there are two menu systems - North and South. Food quality is very fine. Hostel facilities are good. Every room has a Wi-Fi fa...

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University gateway to a dream life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the finest in the city it has 275 acres campus which feels unreal. Several Canteens and garden multiple libraries a huge sports complex consisting of football ground, cricket ground, basketball court, tennis court and kabbadi ground. Along with it multiple labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every registered student, and labs, classrooms, and the library are available in the college. The hostel in my college is good, but we have to adjust to the food. We can play on the grounds of the college, and medical facilities are available at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip University, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: Our college mess and canteen are good. Sports and games are organized in our college. Medical facilities and other things are provided by the college. Our college library is so valuable and big for students. They also provide us with many things.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best climate. It is the best college in the city.
reviews.review_text: The department offers well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with clean rooms. Mess and canteen food is average. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports and games facilities are good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: From my side, this college is good, because the teaching staff is so good.
reviews.review_text: Some facilities are good, and some are bad like Wi-Fi, classrooms, canteen, and food are not very good. Medical facilities are good. There are no sports here. There is a sports ground but they cannot teach sports. They force us to play.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Sandip University is top-notch. Classrooms have projectors and TV screens for a better understanding of concepts. The quality of facilities in my hostel is above average. The food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are present on campus.  Also, having two grounds on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University is worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. In some classrooms, Wi-Fi, digital TVs, and AC are available, but in others, these facilities are not available. The maintenance of hostels is also above average. The food in the canteen is of poor quality, and many students are getting sick due to acidity. There is one ambulance in the college, so the medical facilities are good. There are separate grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball. It has very good facilities for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Students of Sandip University.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good to see, and Wi-Fi is available in labs in our college. There are two central libraries for this course. There is good food, chicken is nice to eat, and some other food, like vada pav, is so nice.

college_info.intro:
SVECW offers BTech and MTech courses which are popular. BTech and MTech at SVECW are offered in full-time mode for the duration of 4 and 2 years. BTech specialisations include Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
1. Information Technology, Electronics
2. Communication Engineering
3. Electrical and Electronics Engineering
4. Civil Engineering and Mechanical Engineering.
Moreover, MTech is offered at the PG level in CSE, VLSI Design, Power Electronics, and Software Engineering.

faqs.answer: A:    The minimum eligibility for engineering admissions is 45% in class 12th. If you score 60%, you are eligible to apply for engineering entrance exams.  Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women in Bhimavaram accepts the following exams:  VU Entrance ExaminationUCEEDAPICETShri Vishnu Engineering College for Women offers 12 courses across 3 streams. They have over 800 seats and offer full-time and part-time education.  Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women accepts students who have cleared their 10+2. In 2021, a candidate with a rank of 7500 in the General-Female category secured admission to Computer Science Engineering
faqs.question: Can I get admission to Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW) is done through EAMCET counseling or by enrolling with the college. Candidates must perform well in Andhra Pradesh EAMCET and score as equivalent to the SVECW's B Tech cut-off norms.  Other ways to join SVECW include:  Buying a seat through management quota or NRI seat directlyCompleting an undergraduate degree with 50% aggregateCompleting the VU Entrance Examination or UCEEDSVECW has over 800 seats and offers 12 courses across 3 streams.

faqs.answer: Well, I would say this college is unique by the nature it's surrounded by. It's totally a huge greenery campus where you can find peace at your step. Also the campus has the most beautiful carves everywhere.
faqs.question: Q: What is unique about Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?

faqs.answer: Yes, Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women is recognized by association of Indian universities. It's an autonomous college as well associated under Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada. Approved by All India Council for Technical Education and graded A+ recently.
faqs.question: Q: Is Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women recognised by the AIU?

faqs.answer: For admission in the B.Tech programme, the candidates are required to appear in EAPCET also known as EAMCET. For admission through lateral entry, in the B.Tech programme at SVECW Bhimavaram, the candidates should have a valid ECET scoreStudents at SVECW Bhimavaram get an opportunity to apply for various scholarships like AICTE- Saksham Scholarship Scheme for Specially- Abled Students, AICTE Swanath Scholarship Scheme for Students and Pragati Scholarship for Girls Students.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process of Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?

faqs.answer: The application forms for Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW) were available from August 29, 2023 to October 4, 2023. SVECW's admission process is entrance-based and offline. Admission is based on the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET entrance exam rank. Other accepted exams include: GATE, PGECET, ICET, VU Entrance Examination, UCEED. Admission can be obtained through EAMCET counseling or by enrollment with SVECW. SVECW has over 800 seats and offers 12 courses across 3 streams. In 2023, the highest package offered was INR 41 LPA and the average package was INR 5.4 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?
overview_faqs.answer: Well, I would say this college is unique by the nature it's surrounded by. It's totally a huge greenery campus where you can find peace at your step. Also the campus has the most beautiful carves everywhere.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women recognised by the AIU?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women is recognized by association of Indian universities. It's an autonomous college as well associated under Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada. Approved by All India Council for Technical Education and graded A+ recently.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech at Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the Bachelor of Technology courses at Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women is INR 2.8 Lakh (for 4 years). The fees might include components other than tuition fees also. Tuition fee is calculated on the basis of first year. Actual amount may vary. The fees are as per AP EAPCET.

overview_faqs.question: How is college life at Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?
overview_faqs.answer: It's really a good experience being here I would say. You will experience the beautiful college life especially with your friends, campus, hostel life. The infrastructure is so good with placements as well. The faculty is also so friendly (interactive). You will learn more about tech life and student's life would be in engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college if you can use the resources well and are dedicated.

content.Placements: The college provides many programs to get the students placed in top companies like the CRT programme and all. The highest package as per the records is 45 LPA, and the average package of the college is about 3–4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, etc. Around 65 to 70 percent of the students get placed in the college. Top roles like software developer are offered in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The labs, classrooms, and library are excellent and top-rated. They give first priority to hygiene. Every part of the campus is very neat and clean. The hostel rooms are also very neat; they clean them regularly and maintain proper hygiene. Medical facilities are also available all the time. Separate facilities for games like carrom, basketball, and cricket are also provided within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College review of SVECW (Bhimavaram).

content.Placements: Our college offers placements to 70–80 percent of students. 31 LPA is the highest, and 4 LPA is the lowest. Companies like Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini often visit our college and hire students in bulk, with multiple software roles.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are not yet good, but average. The most peaceful place is the library, as it provides some study rooms to students for their examination preparations. The quality of mess food is also average only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Good placements. In 2023-2024, the placement rate was approximately 90-93 percent. Good selection rate. The highest package is 41 LPA, the average is 5.6 LPA-6 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. This year, 54 LPA. Top companies are Amazon, Adobe, Flipkart, Meesho, Visa, Infosys, TCS, and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. 24/7 Wi-Fi access. Good labs and a 24/7 computer lab facility. Good lab and well-equipped. AC classrooms, AC labs, good faculty, good library, and a 24/7 library facility are available. We have good food in the mess. We have other facilities like a gym and a playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, and placement records.

content.Placements: Almost 90 percent of the students were placed in this course, and the highest package was around 40 LPA, while the lowest was nearly 3 LPA. The average package offered by this course is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Amazon, TCS, Apple, and so on visited the campus to hire the students. At the end of the course, a maximum of the students will receive internship offers.
content.Infrastructure: Vishnu Engineering College for Women provides better facilities and security to the girls inside the campus from outside students. They provide 24/7 Wi-Fi availability, and all labs and the library are well equipped with air conditioning, and classrooms are well maintained. The food was good, but sometimes we weren't satisfied with the taste; it happens in every college, and we have a 24/7 ambulance service inside the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: SVECW Admission 2025: Eligibility Criteria, Application Process, Exam Dates

admission_process.title: SVECW Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women admission2025 isbasedon an entrance exam. The college offers Btech, MTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. To be admitted to theSVECW, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women application process is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theShri Vishnu Engineering College for Women course admission.

SVECW courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forShri Vishnu Engineering College for Women courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 in the relevant stream from a recognised board
Graduation from a recognised university
BE /BTech from a recognised university
AP PGECET/GATE

Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women admission process includes registration and merit list preparation as per respective course entrance exam. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in SVECW:
STEP 1: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedShri Vishnu Engineering College for Women feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on entrance exam scores as per respective courses. For the BTech course, candidates must sit and appear for AP EAMCET, For MBA, APICET and for the MTech course, aspirants must sit and appear for AP PGECET / GATE.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

headings.text: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women Admission: Eligibility & Selection
Steps for Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women Admission Process 2025

faqs.question: Can I join Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women without Andhra Pradesh EAMCET?
faqs.answer: Admission to Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW) is done through EAMCET counseling or by enrolling with the college. Candidates must perform well in Andhra Pradesh EAMCET and score as equivalent to the SVECW's B Tech cut-off norms.Other ways to join SVECW include:Buying a seat through management quota or NRI seat directlyCompleting an undergraduate degree with 50% aggregateCompleting the VU Entrance Examination or UCEEDSVECW has over 800 seats and offers 12 courses across 3 streams.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility for engineering admissions is 45% in class 12th. If you score 60%, you are eligible to apply for engineering entrance exams.Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women in Bhimavaram accepts the following exams:VU Entrance ExaminationUCEEDAPICETShri Vishnu Engineering College for Women offers 12 courses across 3 streams. They have over 800 seats and offer full-time and part-time education.Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women accepts students who have cleared their 10+2. In 2021, a candidate with a rank of 7500 in the General-Female category secured admission to Computer Science Engineering

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?
faqs.answer: For admission in the B.Tech programme, the candidates are required to appear in EAPCET also known as EAMCET. For admission through lateral entry, in the B.Tech programme at SVECW Bhimavaram, the candidates should have a valid ECET scoreStudents at SVECW Bhimavaram get an opportunity to apply for various scholarships like AICTE- Saksham Scholarship Scheme for Specially- Abled Students, AICTE Swanath Scholarship Scheme for Students and Pragati Scholarship for Girls Students.

faqs.question: When is Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women application forms out?
faqs.answer: The application forms for Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW) were available from August 29, 2023 to October 4, 2023.SVECW's admission process is entrance-based and offline. Admission is based on the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET entrance exam rank.Other accepted exams include: GATE, PGECET, ICET, VU Entrance Examination, UCEED.Admission can be obtained through EAMCET counseling or by enrollment with SVECW.SVECW has over 800 seats and offers 12 courses across 3 streams. In 2023, the highest package offered was INR 41 LPA and the average package was INR 5.4 LPA.

placement_data.title: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women Placement overview
paragraphs: A total of 70 companies visited the campus and 818 offers were made during Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women placements 2024. Earlier, Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women has released its placement statistics for 2023. So far, the highest package and average package offered during placements 2023 stood at INR 41 LPA and INR 5.4 LPA , respectively. More than 1,440 placement offers and over 725 unique placement offers have been made during Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women placements 2023. A total of 729 students were eligible for placements and more than 90 companies were visited during placements 2023. The top recruiters of Vishnu Engineering College Bhimavaram in placements 2023 were Adobe, DarwinBox, Target Corporation, Publics Sapiant, Caterpillar , etc.

faqs.question: How was placement at Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?
faqs.answer: In 2023, Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW) made over 1,440 placement offers. The highest package offered was INR 41 LPA, and the average package was INR 5.4 LPA. Some companies that visited the college in 2023 include: TCS, Infoysis, HCL, IBM, State Street, DBS Bank, Zemoso, Bank of America. Around 93% of students were placed in top companies, including: Amazon, Adobe, Expedia, Infosys. Around 60% of students also received internships. SVECW has a training center with experienced faculty from various departments.

faqs.question: How are B.Tech placements at Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women?
faqs.answer: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women in East Godavari, Andhra Pradesh has good placement rates. In 2023, the average package offered was INR 6.22 LPA. The highest package offered was 41 LPA for engineering programs. 93% of students are placed in top companies like: Amazon, Adobe, Expedia, Infosys. Top recruiting companies include: Accenture, TCS, Capgemini, IBM, Microsoft. In 2023, : 400 students were offered above INR 6 LPA 97 students were offered above INR 10 LPA 16 students were offered above INR 20 LPA The highest salary package was 41 LPA for engineering programs

faqs.answer: A:    MGM's College of Engineering and Technology has been rated 2.7 on placements on the basis of 140 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at MGM's College of Engineering and Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MGM's College of Engineering and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the MGM College programmes is around INR 66,416 to 3,25,664.

faqs.answer:
A:    MGM's College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in MGM's College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    MGM's College of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at MGM's College of Engineering and Technology are Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do MGM's College of Engineering and Technology offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by MGM's College of Engineering and Technology are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at MGM's College of Engineering and Technology goes up to 750.

overview_faqs.question: Is MGM's College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: MGM's College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, MGM's College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.64 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.96 on Campus Life, 3.01 on Placements, 3.85 on Faculty and 3.77 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MGM College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure and ambience are very good.

content.Placements: I am currently in first year of engineering, so my placements are in 2029. My seniors get placed in good companies with very good or decent packages. Some reputed companies also visit my college for placements, and all are good.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. Labs are clean and high-tech. Every classroom has air conditioning. We also have a Wi-Fi connection and drinking water coolers. The college has a central canteen and a café.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mediocre college, nothing more nothing less.

content.Placements: College placements are good. You must have good skills. You will get placed. 20% to 50% of the students get placed. The starting package is 4 LPA or 4.5 LPA. If you're skills are not that good, then you will get 2.6 LPA package. Software companies and other job roles are offered. We get companies like Capgemini, Accenture, and Infosys to come sometime.
content.Infrastructure: College campus is good. All the infrastructure is good. The PCs and Wi-Fi have been upgraded. This year, the hostel food is good. There is a canteen named Poshan. It is also good and we get a big campus as there are medical facilities here. Medical camps are also there. Sports and games are played very well, and organized in our college fest, named Mangalam.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, above average in most categories.

content.Placements: Placements are above average, and seniors are satisfied but not exceptional, possibly what one would expect while getting admission into this college. Still depends on the student's grades and skills college is not very helpful with that. Multiple courses are provided which is good.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. There is no auditorium just a small seminar hall. The college building is quite average. Hostel facilities are good. Two canteens at reasonable prices and a cafe with good services. Medical college and hospital are just beside in case of a medical emergency.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty with less crowd and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement rate of our colleges is 70%. The highest package of all colleges is 15 LPA, and the average package of our college is 4 LPA. The top recruiters are Cap, meaning Infosys, ICIC, Snapdeal, Tata Consultancy, JP Morgan, ShareChat, and for civil students. There are many start-ups to get a place in the average package.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostels available for engineering students, only for MBBS and Medical students. College libraries are very good and structured with a subscription based model. The AC classrooms are there, and their canteen also provides budget friendly food for engineering students. The quality of food is decent, according to its price.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review on M. G. M college of engineering kamothe Navi Mumbai.

content.Placements: The highest package is around 5-7 lacs, the average package is 3-4.5 lacs, and the lowest is 1.2 lacs. I am not in my fourth year, so the professors and other faculty members are not interested in informing us about placements. There are only banners of around 30-40 companies coming to the college. I have never seen those companies, but okay. I don't know how many students secure on-campus internships, but I don't think it's above 20-30%. The college sends some paid internship courses to the official group, which we have to pay for, and they don't tell us whether it's worth it or not.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in MGM's College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
MGM's College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at MGM's College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by MGM's College of Engineering and Technology are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at MGM's College of Engineering and Technology goes up to 750.
