reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure and ambience are very good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Labs are clean and high-tech. Every classroom has air conditioning. We also have a Wi-Fi connection and drinking water coolers. The college has a central canteen and a café.

reviews.review_heading: Mediocre college, nothing more nothing less.
reviews.review_text: College campus is good. All the infrastructure is good. The PCs and Wi-Fi have been upgraded. This year, the hostel food is good. There is a canteen named Poshan. It is also good and we get a big campus as there are medical facilities here. Medical camps are also there. Sports and games are played very well, and organized in our college fest, named Mangalam.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, above average in most categories.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. There is no auditorium just a small seminar hall. The college building is quite average. Hostel facilities are good. Two canteens at reasonable prices and a cafe with good services. Medical college and hospital are just beside in case of a medical emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with less crowd and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels available for engineering students, only for MBBS and Medical students. College libraries are very good and structured with a subscription based model. The AC classrooms are there, and their canteen also provides budget friendly food for engineering students. The quality of food is decent, according to its price.

reviews.review_heading: Review on M. G. M college of engineering kamothe Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the labs. Whenever you connect the lab PC to Wi-Fi, it only works for 10-15 minutes. The ground floor was assigned to nursing students, and now we think they will give the first floor too. The library is present, but there is a lab professor who always tells us not to sit in groups. It's nonsense; we go to the library to help each other, study, or discuss mini projects. The worst part of the library is that you have to write your name.

reviews.review_heading: MGM has good infrastructure with affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: MGM College has a huge campus in Navi Mumbai. The college building is fully white and has a huge campus. There are 7 to 8 computer labs only for CS students, and one floor is booked only for the EXTC department. The college has good entrance through GATE and has 5 floors, while civil and mechanical departments have 2 floors in a different building. The college has two canteens on campus and one cafe. There is also a basketball court and a cricket playground in the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to take admission for B. Tech.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top-notch. No hostel facility is available. There are huge ground for sports. All kinds of sports and activities are played. Canteen is good, clean, hygienic and provides good quality meals at an affordable price. Labs, classrooms, and library all are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Mahatma Gandhi Mission College of Engineering and Technology, Kamothe, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available everywhere. We have 2 canteens 1 central canteen and 1 entrance canteen. There is also a cafe called Poshan and a CCD network. Our ground is huge, and we encourage a lot of sports. The college interior is good. We have great infrastructure. There are lots of amenities like a gym, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent facilities with good faculty, above-average placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of MGM College of Engineering, Kamothe is very good. It has vast grounds, canteens, cafes, and acquires a huge area of land. The BME course is in the engineering building. The building has tiled flooring all over with lift facilities for students too. It has washrooms and water filters on every floor. Wi-Fi is available in the seminar hall, which is available for students to sit in. The library is huge with two furnished reading rooms and a huge collection of books. Classrooms hav...

reviews.review_heading: There are few Departments w.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, SRCC is one of the best colleges in the country, matching international standards. It is one of the few colleges in the University of Delhi that has upgraded its classrooms to facilitate teaching through modern tools and techniques. The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, a library, a state-of-the-art seminar room, and a fully equipped auditorium with a seating capacity of over 750 people.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college as it has good placement.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is good and spacious. It's a very big campus, and most importantly, it's ragging-free. The facilities provided by the college are good, including wifi, well-maintained labs and classrooms, and a library. One drawback is that the college doesn't have an auditorium. On the plus side, there are almost four canteens on campus.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has a large ground, an auditorium, two museums, and two libraries. The college has strict rules about ragging, ensuring student safety. Hostel facilities are available, and everything in the college is digital, which is very good.

reviews.review_heading: MGMCET for Biomedical Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. The college has one hostel and 3 canteens in total. The classrooms of my department are not so good, but the IT department has very good classrooms and labs. Faculty of my department is better than that of any other branch in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The time spent in college was so memorable. The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was beautiful and the classrooms were very comfortable for nearly 100 students as well. The college does provide us with Wi-Fi connections. The college has very good and proper library facilities. The college does provide separate hostel facilities for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Placements can be improved at the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course was above average in this college. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, etc. facilities were also available for the students on campus. All the facilities were of good quality. Hostel facility were also given to the students. The food in our hostel mess was good to eat.

review_summary.college_name: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good placements and average hostel life and facilities, rest campus is good.

content.Placements: Placement criteria are good and above average. Placement opportunities are available in this college, and if you have a good skill set in any programming language or data analytics, then you can easily get a package up to 10+ LPA. I am talking about the MCA department.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course is average, or I would say okay, as the course is outdated and the subjects are repeated, since we have already studied them in BCA. So for MCA, the course is mostly the same with some little changes. I would say the MCA course should be updated to gain new knowledge. Talking about the hostel, the hostel living is good if you get a 3 bed room, but if you get a 4 bed room or a 6 bed room, then the experience is literally not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Nice if you have confidence in yourself, as you can't completely depend on the college itself.

content.Placements: Like I don't know much, but it is a rumour that this year the highest placement was 12 LPA and the average was around 4 to 5 LPA. As I have seen, college is good because the teachers' studying style is nice, but at the same time, some teachers' behaviour is rude towards students.
content.Faculty: Their exam pattern is easy compared to other colleges, and the schedule is also according to the students' needs and weather conditions are also taken into consideration. Also, they don't rush for exams and a 1500 fee for reappearing for 1 semester, that's also nice and affordable. I am currently in my 2nd year, and the syllabus for this year is just wow. Means it covers all the core subjects like OS and DS. Also, the other subjects and labs are interesting, like Data Electronics, which is also a base subject required for clearing the GATE exam.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is also very good compared to other colleges. The facilities of this college are also very good, all the institutions are well-established. And its hostel buildings are very good, all hygienic foods are available, etc.

individual_reviews.title: It is a highly recommended college, because of the curriculum provided at this fee structure.

content.Infrastructure: Electronics department labs are well-equipped, with proper internet services and learning equipment. Facilities in the hostel are commendable. individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: GITAM review: Placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement at this college is average. Service-based companies or startup companies come for the placement. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, and TCS. Companies offer roles like frontend developer, backend developer, website designer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is not good but average. College provides facilities like library and Wi-Fi. There are a lot of books available for every department. College also provides hostel facility with mess. There is a canteen right next to mess.

admission_overview.title: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management admission is done on both merit and entrance basis. The institute offers several courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. These programmes are offered mainly in the fields of Technology, Management, Computer Applications, etc. Students seeking to join the institute need to ensure that they fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before going ahead with the admission process. The application process mainly commences online via the official website of the institute. Ganga Institute of Technology and Management, also known as GITAM Jhajjar, is an autonomous institute approved by AICTE and affiliated to MDU, Rohtak. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility criteria, and admission process at Ganga Institute of Technology and Management.

eligibility_selection.title: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management course admission is primarily merit-based; however, the institute may also consider students' performance in the accepted entrance test. Further, the institute also conducts GITAM Scholarship cum Admission Test, which is a national-level entrance test for admission to courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, BCA, and MCA courses. Aspiring students need to make sure that they not only fulfil the eligibility criteria of the course, but also clear the selection rounds.

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 or equivalent with Physics/ Mathematics/ and any one of Chemistry/ CS/ Electronics/ IT/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotech/ Technical Vocational Subjects/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with at least 45% marks (42.75% marks in case of candidates belonging to the reserved category of Haryana Only) in the above subjects taken together
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% (42.7% for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually and Differently Abled candidates of Harayana only)
Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board with a minimum aggregate of 50% (47.5% for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually and Differently Abled candidates of Harayana only)
BTech or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 50% (47.5% for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually and Differently Abled candidates of Harayana only)
Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (47.5% for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually and Differently Abled candidates of Harayana only)

Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects + one of the following: Chemistry/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ CS/ IT/ IP/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies with a minimum aggregate of 45% or a 10 + 3 diploma with Maths as a compulsory subject
Graduation in Architecture from a recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 50% OR An associate membership of the Indian Institute of Architects
UG degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university/ institution
UG Degree + B.Ed degree from a recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 50%

admission_process.title: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TheGanga Institute of Technology and Management admission processconsists of multiple stages like registration, selection, results & admission confirmation. The students must begin by meeting the eligibility requirement of their desired course & then fill out the application forms. TheGITAM Jhajjar application processis conducted online on the official site of the Institute. The steps to apply for course admissions at the institute are mentioned below:
Application Process
Application forms are released on theGanga Institute of Technology and Management'swebsite. Submit the duly filled form with the application fees & docs.
Selection Process

The selection requirement for all courses offered at Ganga Institute are merit-based, i.e., students are shortlisted based on their merit secured in the qualifying test. However, students may also have to appear for the scholarship-cum-admission test conducted by the institute based on which students are selected.
Results & Admission Confirmation
Candidates who get shortlisted for admission are required to pay theGanga Institute of Technology and Management fees& report to the college campus to submit the original documents.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MBA admissions at GITAM in offline mode?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot applyfor the MBA admissions at GITAM in offline mode. To apply for the MBA admissions at GITAM, candidates must register for the CAT or MAT entrance exam. Registrations for either entrance exam is only acceptable in the mode prescribed in the announcement circular. Any other form of registrations is considered void including offline mode of registrations.

faqs.question: Have the dates for the JEE Mains exam 2026 been announced yet?
faqs.answer: No, the JEE Mains exam dates have not been announcedat this point of time. Generally, the JEE Mains timeline is announced in the month of October which is very soon to arrive. Candidates who are interested in appearing for the JEE Mains examination are advised to visit the official portal to remain updated on the release of the announcement circular.

faqs.question: Are admissions into GITAM BBA courses still open in 2025?
faqs.answer: No, candidates who wish to gain admissions into BBA course at GITAM cannot apply for the 2025 admissions. GITAM BBA courses are decided through the GAT entrance examination. The last date to register for the GITAM 2025 entrance exam was 5th June 2025.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in GITAM BBA without GAT entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get admissions into GITAM BBA courses without giving the GAT entrance exam. The GITAM BBA course admissions are decided on merit basis, taking into account the scores obtained by a candidate in the GITAM GAT entrance exam. Hence, candidates must register for the GITAM GAT entrance examto be eligible for admissions into the GITAM BBA courses.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA at GITAM?
faqs.answer: GITAM BBA fees may contain several fee components including tuition fee, hostel fee, examination fee, one-time payments and other fees. The total tuition fee for BBA at GITAM is INR 1.8 Lacs and the hostel fees can vary between INR 70,000 - INR 1 Lacs per year. Fees regarding other fee components has not been disclosed by GITAM. Candidates can learn more by contacting the officials of GITAM.

faqs.question: When are seats allotted to candidates at GITAM during BBA admissions?
faqs.answer: The seats allotted to candidates applying for GITAM BBA courses are allotted after the candidates have cleared the personal interview round. Candidates who score appropriate ranks in the GITAM GAT entrance exam are the only ones who are called for the personal intervie round. Once a seat has been allotted to the candidates, they are required to pay the admission fees for GITAM BBA courses to confirm it.

placement_data.title: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management GITAM Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: GITAM recorded an overall max. package of 40 LPA. Whereas, the institute recorded an average package of 5.5 LPA . The median package offered to the graduates was 5.2 LPA . Moreover, the institute has released the BTech packages & the BTech CSE highest package offered stood at 102 LPA in 2025. The institute provides excellent job placements for its students in all programs. This season, over 350 companies took part in placement drives, & have seen partnerships with 400 companies for training & placements. The placement season saw participation from recruiters in various sectors, including Engineering & Technology, Oil & Gas, IT/Software, Electronic Hardware, Data Analytics, Consulting, Finance/Banking, & FMCG.

GITAM alumni are placed at big firms like Google, Microsoft, TCS, HCL, IBM, etc . Times Engineering Institute Ranking Survey ranked the institute on 63 in India for placements & received the National Award for Excellence in Placements. The key activities include:

hostel_campus.college_name: Ganga Institute of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placements and average hostel life and facilities, rest campus is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course is average, or I would say okay, as the course is outdated and the subjects are repeated, since we have already studied them in BCA. So for MCA, the course is mostly the same with some little changes. I would say the MCA course should be updated to gain new knowledge. Talking about the hostel, the hostel living is good if you get a 3 bed room, but if you get a 4 bed room or a 6 bed room, then the experience is literally not good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice if you have confidence in yourself, as you can't completely depend on the college itself.
reviews.review_text: Like I don't know much, but it is a rumour that this year the highest placement was 12 LPA and the average was around 4 to 5 LPA. As I have seen, college is good because the teachers' studying style is nice, but at the same time, some teachers' behaviour is rude towards students.

reviews.review_heading: Although, this college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is also very good compared to other colleges. The facilities of this college are also very good, all the institutions are well-established. And its hostel buildings are very good, all hygienic foods are available, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a highly recommended college, because of the curriculum provided at this fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Electronics department labs are well-equipped, with proper internet services and learning equipment. Facilities in the hostel are commendable. The quality of food available in the mess is not top-notch but edible, but the main highlight is the cafeteria, must try it. Every medical facility is available and set-ups for sports and games are present.

reviews.review_heading: GITAM review: Placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is not good but average. College provides facilities like library and Wi-Fi. There are a lot of books available for every department. College also provides hostel facility with mess. There is a canteen right next to mess.

reviews.review_heading: Inside Ganga Institute of Technology and Management - A student's perspective.
reviews.review_text: College has hostels for both boys and girls. Boys hostel is better as compared to girls college. We have a library in our college which is in very good condition. Mess food for hostel students is very good. Sports are also conducted by faculty members from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ganga Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The college building is fine but the classes don't have projectors or a Wi-Fi facility which is a drawback. The library has many books which are useful for the course and we can issue the books required for studies. The college has hostel facilities, since I haven't used a hostel, I can't say further about the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ganga Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: I am talking about the hostel, mess, and college campus infrastructure of the Ganga Institute of Technology and Management. The Wi-Fi in the hostel is good, and the room is big. The infrastructure of the hostel is very vast, and the infrastructure of the college campus is cool.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students with low financial status, with a good campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: For my course, facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, library, etc., are available for all students. There is also a hostel for students who live far from the college. The facilities provided in the hostel are average. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, food, three-person rooms, etc. The food is average, and the canteen is available until 4 PM. The facilities for sports are limited.

reviews.review_heading: The college has average placements.
reviews.review_text: For my course, facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, library, etc. There is also a hostel for students who live far from the college. The facilities provided in the hostel are average. It offers amenities like Wi-Fi, food, and three-person rooms. The food is average, and the canteen is available until 4 pm. The facilities for sports are limited.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with teachers and faculty members of the college in 1st year.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our course are not very good. There is Wi-Fi in labs,  but students do not have access to it. But the overall infrastructure is good. The library is okay but the librarian is not good. In hostels, three students live in the same room.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on GITAM college.
reviews.review_text: In my course, facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, library, etc., are available for all students. There is also a hostel for students who live far from college. Facilities provided in the hostel are average. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, food, three-sharing rooms, etc. The food is average and the canteen is available till 4 PM. Sports facilities are less.

reviews.review_heading: College is average on top of that no value for money. I am giving 2-star rating for it.
reviews.review_text: For my course, facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classroom, library, etc., are available for all students. There is also a hostel for students who live far from college. Facilities provided in hostel are average. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi food, three-person room, etc. The food is average and the canteen is available till 4:00 PM. Facilities for sports are less.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review of Ganga Institute of Technology and Management, Jhajjar (as a 2nd year CSE student).
reviews.review_text: As a second-year CSE student at GITM, I find infrastructure decent. Classrooms and labs are well-equipped, but Wi-Fi and lab equipment need improvement. Library has a good collection of books. Hostel rooms are spacious with basic amenities, but the mess food quality is average. Wi-Fi speed fluctuates, especially during peak hours. Security is well managed, and the overall hostel environment is suitable for studies. While facilities are good, better internet, improved lab resources, and upgraded ...

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students do not get admission here. If anyone gets admission here, they will regret it.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, neat and clean. The gym is a bit good. The mess food is not good. In food, they give so much oil. In this hostel, Wi-Fi is working well, but it does not have a good speed. The library is very good.

GITAM BBA fees may contain several fee components including tuition fee, hostel fee, examination fee, one-time payments and other fees. Yes, students of BBA courses at GITAM can receive scholarships if they manage to score  good result in their last qualifying exam. The GITAM BBA scholarships are also known as the Golden Eagle scholarships which can award upto INR 20,000 to BBA students who scored over 90% in their last qualifying exam at the time of admission. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In our college, we have great infrastructure with a good canteen and a good bistro cafe.

review_content.Placements: In our college 30% of people in my branch have been placed until now. The highest package until now is 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini and Unlox. 50% of students got an internship from our course. Top roles as a strategic and Operations head, and a software engineer, etc, are offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have a great infrastructure available for our course. We have Wi-Fi in the library. We have iMac labs. We have a canteen in the college, and we have a bistro cafe in our college. We have a big net ground for playing various games. We have a short swimming pool in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure with moderate placements.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2026 passing out batch of Computer Engineering. 75 to 80 percent of students from my course are placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is 12 to 14LPA the lowest package offered is 2.8 to 3LPA and the average pacakge offered is 5 to 5.5LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good and it has a nice campus with 3 phases. 1 phase is for Engineering students 2 phase is for Hotel Management students and 3 phase is for MBA and Data Science course students. Our college also has a fashion design course in 3 phases.

review_summary.college_name: Atharva College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Atharva College of Engineering, The Atharva Educational Trust.

content.Placements: Placement in our college is decent. As seen, mostly 80% students are placed by the end of the course. As usual, the CE and IT branches usually get higher packages. The average package range is around 4-5 LPA in our branch. The highest package can go up to around 12-15 LPA in some cases. Top recruiters include TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, Byju's, Accenture, Local Startups, etc. Most of the companies offer roles like Software Development, Web Developer, QA Engineer, etc. At the end, it all comes down to your skills and patience to grab the best of the packages.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure and the faculty members. The college has good placements.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed. The highest package is 12-24 LPA. Many top telecom companies offered internships and jobs to some of the students. The lowest package could be approximately 3-5 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Godrej, Infosys, Infotech, etc., recruit.
content.Infrastructure: They provide everything, labs, classrooms, a separate girls' room, playground, even canteens and cafes. The infrastructure is really good, and the washrooms are kept very clean for both the students and the faculty members. We have washrooms on the ground floor, 1st floor,3rd, 4th and 5th floors.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In our college, we have great infrastructure with a good canteen and a good bistro cafe.

content.Placements: In our college 30% of people in my branch have been placed until now. The highest package until now is 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini and Unlox. 50% of students got an internship from our course. Top roles as a strategic and Operations head, and a software engineer, etc, are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have a great infrastructure available for our course. We have Wi-Fi in the library. We have iMac labs. We have a canteen in the college, and we have a bistro cafe in our college. We have a big net ground for playing various games. We have a short swimming pool in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure with moderate placements.

content.Placements: I am from the 2026 passing out batch of Computer Engineering. 75 to 80 percent of students from my course are placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is 12 to 14LPA the lowest package offered is 2.8 to 3LPA and the average pacakge offered is 5 to 5.5LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good and it has a nice campus with 3 phases. 1 phase is for Engineering students 2 phase is for Hotel Management students and 3 phase is for MBA and Data Science course students. Our college also has a fashion design course in 3 phases.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and facilities go well.

content.Placements: Around 70-85 percent of students from our batch are placed. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA-12 LPA, the average is around 4 LPA-5 LPA, and the lowest is around 2.5 LPA-3 LPA. The major recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, Capgemini, and a few startups. Around 40-60 percent of students got internships mostly through companies like TCS, Byju's, local startups, and on-campus drives. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, System Engineer, Support Engineer, and Intern-Trainee roles.
content.Infrastructure: The course infrastructure is quite good. Our classrooms are equipped with projectors, and the department has well-maintained computer labs, Wi-Fi, and a decent library with good book availability. Hostel facilities are average. Rooms are clean but Wi-Fi speed varies. The mess food is moderate, with limited variety but hygienic. Medical facilities are basic and sports facilities include a ground, indoor games, and a small gym.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atharva College of Engineering, The Atharva Educational Trust.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is one of the strongest and best parts of our college that I loved the most. The campus is clean 24 hours a day. Washrooms are frequently cleaned throughout the day. There are 2 well-maintained libraries. The campus has greenery, which is a positive point. Wi-Fi facilities are available, and the network is pretty strong throughout. Classrooms are super clean with AC and the best bench facilities. Labs are well-maintained and equipment-full, too. Overall, I am more than satisfied w...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure and the faculty members. The college has good placements.
reviews.review_text: They provide everything, labs, classrooms, a separate girls' room, playground, even canteens and cafes. The infrastructure is really good, and the washrooms are kept very clean for both the students and the faculty members. We have washrooms on the ground floor, 1st floor,3rd, 4th and 5th floors.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, we have great infrastructure with a good canteen and a good bistro cafe.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have a great infrastructure available for our course. We have Wi-Fi in the library. We have iMac labs. We have a canteen in the college, and we have a bistro cafe in our college. We have a big net ground for playing various games. We have a short swimming pool in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with moderate placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good and it has a nice campus with 3 phases. 1 phase is for Engineering students 2 phase is for Hotel Management students and 3 phase is for MBA and Data Science course students. Our college also has a fashion design course in 3 phases.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and facilities go well.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is quite good. Our classrooms are equipped with projectors, and the department has well-maintained computer labs, Wi-Fi, and a decent library with good book availability. Hostel facilities are average. Rooms are clean but Wi-Fi speed varies. The mess food is moderate, with limited variety but hygienic. Medical facilities are basic and sports facilities include a ground, indoor games, and a small gym.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good infrastructure, events & crowd, but a few rude faculty & limited placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are the best. We have Wi-Fi in our college on every floor, and the labs are so great, and the infrastructure is so good. There are 2 libraries in our engineering building, and every classroom is a smart classroom, as each class has AC in it. There is no hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and decent placements. Teaching quality and curriculum need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Atharva College of Engineering is honestly one of its strong points. The campus is modern, clean, and well-maintained. For Computer and IT departments, there are well-equipped labs with updated systems, high-speed Wi-Fi, and air-conditioned classrooms with projectors. The library is spacious and digital-friendly, offering access to reference books, journals, and even e-learning portals. The hostel facilities are available but limited in number. Rooms are clean and basic. It...

reviews.review_heading: Great for CS IT students, with decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-maintained labs, and a large library with sufficient books and journals. Each department has dedicated lab space and project rooms. Campus is clean and modern. Hostel facilities are decent with good security, and rooms are shared with basic amenities. The mess food is average, but there are many eating options nearby. Medical facilities are available on call, and sports grounds are accessible for football, basketball, and cricke...

reviews.review_heading: Atharva is a great college for placements, infrastructure, and student life.
reviews.review_text: Campus includes well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a digital library, seminar halls, a dedicated placement cell, and an auditorium. College also offers excellent Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, and tech-enabled labs. Course offers a broad overview of industry standards and requirements in today's advanced tech era.

reviews.review_heading: College has low placements.
reviews.review_text: There are two libraries for students, but only one library has Wi-Fi. There is a common AC lab for all subjects, as I am from the Computer Science Department. There are non-AC classrooms for my department. Atharva College doesn't have a dedicated hostel for Engineering students. There is a canteen and two playgrounds for sports like basketball, football, and cricket, all of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Atharva College Of Engineering Mumbai is a great college.
reviews.review_text: It does not have a hostel, but we will get many options nearby. We will have to rent the flat that ranges from Rs. 15,000-20,000. We will get all facilities like labs Wi-Fi, classrooms and a good environment to study and work. Libraries are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable or expensive - A detailed review of Atharva College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is all that I like they have 2 libraries, 1 gym, 1 canteen, and 1 cafe with a swimming pool. College doesn't have any hostels. Libraries' Wi-Fi works well during decent traffic. Classrooms are not air-conditioned, though all labs have air-conditioners. The quality of canteen food is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: Atharva College of Engineering is a good college.
reviews.review_text: I was a local president, so I was not in the hostel. This college’s infrastructure is huge and good. Our classrooms were provided with air conditioning, and it also has two auditoriums. Good food is provided in the canteens. There are two libraries and a study hall, so there is lots of space to study. Our class had a ratio of about 60% boys and 40% girls. I personally like the sports. A lot of energetic energy is created during sports, which is a good approach from the college. There is a gym, s...

reviews.review_heading: Nice infrastructure, good average placement, great extracurricular, events, and nice faculty .
reviews.review_text: College facilities are so good. Almost all of the classes are AC. Computer labs are well maintained. Every classroom has a projector and PC. College Wi-Fi is very good. Although college doesn't have a hostel because of location, college does have 2 different courts. One for cricket and volleyball and one for basketball. Both are very well maintained on a daily basis.

reviews.review_heading: Reality about my college .
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained labs, classrooms and a library in my college. Wi-Fi is only available on some floors of the building. There is no canteen in my college. We have to go out of college to have food. There isn't any hostel service in my college. Students coming from out of Mumbai have to rent flats outside the college area.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Atharva College of Engineering, The Atharva Educational Trust

likes.text: Top companies like Infosys, LnT, Tech Mahindra and Capgemini visit our college to hire students with a software engineer profile.
The placement committee has put good efforts to provide placements to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Strong legal foundation with good faculty, practical exposure, and vibrant campus life.

review_content.Placements: In our B.A. LL.B. batch at ICFAI University, around 65-70% were placed. The highest package was 7 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and the average was 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters are law firms, ICICI, HDFC, and legal startups. About 80% got internships in courts, NGOs, and firms. Top roles offered are legal associate, analyst, and intern.
review_content.Infrastructure: The B.A. LL.B. department has smart classrooms, a moot court hall, Wi-Fi, and a rich law library. Hostels are decent with basic amenities. Mess food is hygienic, and the canteen offers a variety. Medical aid is available on campus. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor games for overall development.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This college is relatively affordable and well-developed for the students to get graduate.

review_content.Placements: Students get placed but with low packages. But overall, the placement cell is very helpful for those students who are interested in corporate law. They try their best to get the students placed in good places. They even offer placements in well-known metropolitan cities as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our law department offers Wi-Fi, a well-stocked library, and equipped labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms. Mess food is average but hygienic. Canteen offers a good variety. Basic medical aid is also available. Sports facilities are satisfactory.

review_summary.college_name: ICFAI University Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty members, good placements, and great infrastructure with ample facilities.

content.Placements: The previous year, 80 percent of the batch got placed with the highest package of 8 LPA, the lowest went 3 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Reputed companies such as Infosys, Bajaj, Edutech, etc., recruited the students. Almost 70 percent of students got internships in the above-mentioned companies and also some startup companies which recruited the students. Currently, as per the Bachelors, only entry-level roles are being offered to the students. Most roles comprise interns for accountants, marketing, and finance.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers great infrastructure facilities with free in-campus 5G Wi-Fi, newly installed computers providing a brand new lab experience. The classrooms are spacious with air-conditioned classes and smart boards in every classroom. It also offers libraries for each department such as Law, Business, Pharma, Education, etc., along with a large central library open for students from all the departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College offers a well-rounded legal education with strong academics, good exposure.

content.Placements: For the BA LLB (Hons) batch of 2021-2025, around 65% of students are placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. The top recruiters are AZB, Trilegal, and Khaitan. About 75% of students got internships at firms like CAM, HSA, and NGOs. Top roles offered included legal associate, compliance analyst, and researcher.

admission_overview.college_name: ICFAI University Dehradun Admission 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: ICFAI University Dehradun Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The ICFAI University, Dehradun, Uttarakhand offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in Engineering, Law, Management, Education, etc. These courses include BTech, BCA, BSc, BA, BCom, BBA, BA LLB, LLB, B.Ed, MTech, LLM, MCA, MBA, and PhD. Besides this,ICFAI Dehradunoffers a few distance learning courses via its Directorate of Distance Learning, including distance BBA, BCA, MBA, and MCA. Applications can be submitted for admission online as well as offline. The university considers candidates’ merit scores and performance in PI for UG courses. For Law courses and some of the PG courses like MBA and MTech, candidates must have valid scores in the qualifying national-level entrance exam.
Read more around ICFAI University, Dehradun admissions in the following article.

For ICFAI University Dehradun admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toICFAI University course admissions:
XAT/CAT/NMATorIBSAT+ PI
Check:ICFAI University Dehradun Fee Structure

ICFAI University Dehradun admission processincludes various steps such as filling application form, qualifying the selection rounds and releasing of the merit list. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at ICFAI University Dehradun:
STEP 1: Application Process

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Alternatively, students can also download the application form from the university's website and submit it to the admission office.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The ICFAI University Dehradun selection process is both merit and entrance-based. Furthermore, students will be based on several parameters, such as academic qualifications, extracurricular activities (if any), and performance in the university-level PI rounds.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay theICFAI Jharkhand admission feeat the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What specialisations are offered for the BTech Programme at ICFAI University Dehradun?
faqs.answer: The BTech Programme at ICFAI University Dehradun offers specializations in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Engineering, Database Administration and Big Data Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.

faqs.question: How are applicants evaluated for BTech admission at IFCAI University Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Admission evaluation at ICFAI University Dehradun is based on merit, with consideration given to academic achievements, awards in sports/cultural events, debates, quizzes, and other extracurricular activities. An interview process is conducted, and original certificates are verified during the payment of the first semester fee.

courses_data.name: ICFAI University Dehradun MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ICFAI University Dehradun offers an MBA programme in a full-time mode. Admission to the two-year MBA programme offered by IBS Dehradun is based on candidates' valid scores in IBSAT, conducted by IBS. Candidates with GMAT/ NMAT by GMAC/ CAT scores are exempted from IBSAT. More details around ICFAI University Dehradun MBA admission are as follows:

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does ICFAI University Dehradun accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Dehradun accepts entrance exam scores from multiple management entrance tests for admission to its MBA program. The admission process is based on merit, application, and interview. The test scores of the following competitive examinations are considered for admission:IBSATCATGMAT (from 2013 onwards)MATXATNMAT

faqs.question: What is the selection process for admission to MBA at ICFAI University Dehradun?
faqs.answer: For admission to ICFAI ISB’s MBA programme, candidates need to appear for ICFAI Business School Aptitude Test or IBSAT. However, CAT/ GMAT/ NMAT by GMAC scores are also accepted. Eligible candidates with valid scores in the aforementioned exams are required to go through a GD&PI round for final admission.

faqs.question: Where can a candidate check ICFAI University Dehradun cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: On their official website, you may verify the ICFAI University Dehradun cutoff for 2023. The deadline information is accessible for a number of programs, including PGDM and MBA. Here's where to look for it:Go to the official website of ICFAI University Dehradun.Search for the information about the cutoff or admissions section.There is a list of the NMAT cutoff for 2023. The overall NMAT criteria for the General Category is the 55 percentile.

faqs.question: Can I get into ICFAI University Dehradun with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get into ICFAI University Dehradun with 70 percent in class 12th. The university's admission criteria for Undergraduate courses typically require candidates to complete their Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50 percent aggregate in any discipline. Therefore, meeting the minimum eligibility criteria of 50 percent aggregate in Class 12th makes you eligible for admission to ICFAI University Dehradun.

placement_report.college_name: ICFAI University Dehradun Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: ICFAI University Dehradun Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during ICFAI University, Dehradun placements 2024 stood at INR 37 LPA. Earlier, ICFAI University Dehradun has released its placement reports for the batch passing out in 2023 for its various schools. As per the ICFAI Business School (IBS) report, the highest package and average package offered during placements 2023 stood at INR 23 LPA and INR 6.33 LPA , respectively. Further, 93% placement rate was recorded and 58 recruiters participated during ICFAI University Dehradun placements 2023. A total of 50 students and 18 students of ICFAI Law School (ILS) and ICFAI Education School (IES), respectively were placed during placements 2023. Additionally, the highest package offered to IES was INR 9.90 LPA and was made by Unison World School, Dehradun. The top recruiters of ICFAI University Dehradun in 2023 were Berger Paints, Jaro Education, Integreon, Vedantu, Parsoon Legal , etc.
Note : As per the official website, the placement season for the class of 2023 commenced from October’ 2022 .

data: Final Placements: The highest package offered to MBA students in 2022 dropped by 6% when compared with 2021 The average package offered to MBA students rose by 3.5% in 2022 when compared with 2021

tables.title: Average Package 2023-2025
data: ICFAI Business School (IBS) Dehradun Top Companies

faqs.question: What was the median package offered to the students during The ICFAI University, Dehradun placements?
faqs.answer: The median package offered to the students during the ICFAI University, Dehradun placements was approximately INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA in the Companies depending upon Students and how its core skill. The top recruiters of ICFAI University, Dehradun in 2022 included ICICI Bank, Berger Paints, XL Dynamics, PlanetSpark, Droom Technologies and HDFC Bank, etc.

faqs.question: How are the placements after BBA at ICFAI?
faqs.answer: Well, the placement is good after the BBA at ICFAI. Furthermore, ICFAI is very placement-oriented, as it focuses more on practical knowledge than theoretical knowledge. Placements are also of high quality. So, overall, ICFAI is very good for BBA.

faqs.question: Are placements available for B.Ed course in ICFAI Dehradun?
faqs.answer: The Faculty of Education, ICFAI University, Dehradun, has built a strong network with the topmost schools with its unique and highly-appreciated curriculum and high rankings in several annual surveys. The 100% placement track record is testimony to the high demand for IUD B.Ed. The training and placement wing at the university looks after training and placement activities on a continuing basis. Staffed by senior professionals and placement executives, the team initiates and maintains the university-industry dialogue and manages the summer internship program and final placement activities. The team evaluates student performance levels and ensures relevant preparation for their corporate placements. Working both on the supply and demand sides of the placement, the team plays the vital intermediary role of matching academic excellence with industry expectations and counseling the students appropriately.

hostel.description:
Amenities provided are 24 hr power back up, Wi-Fi facility, sports and recreation facilities, mess, first-aid, washing and transportation to and from University.
Tie up with local dispensaries/ doctors has been done to take care of emergency medical care for the inmates.
facilities: Library: The library collection consists of over 30,713 volumes & 13,558 titles in Management, Education, Engineering and Law, and more than 93 leading print Periodicals and subscriptions to online databases, like EBSCO, Manupatra, Emerald Marketing, JSTORE, Lexis Nexis, etc. The Library is an active member of DELNET and has access to anti-plagiarism software URKUND through INFLIBNET.
Computing Facilities: The university has more than 350 Personal computers - with Pentium Core i5, Core 2 Duo, AMD Athlon and dual core processors – and services of IBM, HCL & SUN make.

New Technology Infrastructure: The university has 15 Mbps internet bandwidth for the use of students, faculty and staff. Computers are provided to all teaching staff in their rooms. Photocopying, printing, document scanning and CD writing facilities are available to the students.
Sports and Recreational Facilities: Indoor and some outdoor facilities for sports and recreation are available for the students.

The ICFAI University, Dehradun, offers merit-based scholarships and semester-based scholarships for the BCom programme. For the merit-based scholarship, candidates have to obtain at least 70% aggregate. Other than this, semester-based scholarships are also provided with a minimum 6.0 GPA from the previous semester. Scholarship amount is adjusted equally in six installments for three-year programmes. For BCom (Hons.), the merit-cum-means-based scholarship ranges from INR 19,800 to 29,700, however, based on semester is on a defective format: INR 2,500 – INR 5,000 per semester based on CGPA.

overview_faqs.question: Is Agni College of Technology a good institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Agni College of Technology was established in 2001 by Sri Balaji Charitable and Educational Trust. The college is accredited by NAAC with an A+ grade. It is approved by AICTE and affiliated with Anna University. The institute is awarded a rank band of 101-150 under the Innovation category by NIRF 2023. ACT is proven as No. 1 all over the nation in cultivating skilful Engineers. The college offers various undergraduate, postgraduate and PhD level courses in different Engineering streams.

individual_reviews.title: Value for money, efficient faculty members, and average infrastructure.

content.Placements: 100% of placements are there in my course. The placement department's special training and boost camps are conducted to prepare us. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Core companies are Emerson, Manali Petrochemicals, Technip, Orchid Pharma, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I have an excellent experience studying at this college.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge library. Campus infrastructure is impeccable but the quality of food provided in the hostel is average. Labs provided are quite good in condition. The hostel dorms are clean and spacious. The price in the canteen is quite reasonable and has a good quantity.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members take lessons clearly for students Good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: ​In our course, other in-depth subjects are also taken such as data structure and C for our knowledge. Labs are conducted neatly with students batch-wise. In the hostel, the staff must follow the timetable for our students to grow their knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Review of course, academic experience, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, my department infrastructure is excellent with well-equipped labs, and more ventilated and spacious classrooms with projectors for better learning. Library is stocked with all the necessary resources. As a day scholar, I found facilities accessible and supportive for my academics.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placement, good infrastructure, and supportive faculty members. Good vibe in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for CSE department in my college are well-designed. Wi-Fi connectivity has high speed throughout the campus enabling to access online learning resources example (skill track). CSE department lab has a modern desktop and workstation and every tool is already installed for programming purposes. I'm pursuing a bachelor of engineering in Computer Science at AGNI College of Engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with good placements, friendly faculty members, and good college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has wide green campus. College has a good amount of labs for all departments. But they closed the aerospace department last year. The aerospace department does not have much lab facilities. But other departments like computer science and engineering have good air-conditioned labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure. We have well-trained facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have a strong and excellent infrastructure. We have a hostel facility in our college. Our hostel food is really very good and clean. The hostel rooms have big space. We have a canteen in our college. There are sports, a ground, etc. Our college gives importance to outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with academic, placements and extracurriculars.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was good. But network connectivity was worse. Canteen foods are superb and extraordinary. Sports like kabaddi, cricket, and kho kho will be trained well for both boys and girls (students). An intercollege symposium will be conducted for each and every department.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Agni College of Technology .
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the overall campus is quite okay, but the Computer-related departments are much better. Core departments need to be maintained more, and some machinery should be acquired for better training of the students. Wi-Fi is good, but you will never get mobile tower reception.
Teachers are very helpful as they assist us in every situation. The teaching quality is good, and they teach very well. Most of our subjects are practical; they provide us with fully Wi-Fi-enabled labs with c...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is okay, but studies are very tough.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good, and free Wi-Fi is also available. We can take books from the library for studying. Both veg and non-veg options are available in the mess and canteen. They give more importance to sports for hostel students, with cricket being the major sport.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and better knowledge.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are available at this college. The facilities and infrastructure are Wi-Fi connections, labs, classrooms, libraries, etc. The quality of these facilities is very good, nice, and clean. The food available in the mess and canteen is very hygienic, clean, and healthy. And the other facilities, like medical facilities, sports, and games, are also better.

Reservation category: Seats are reserved for specific classes like Scheduled Caste (SC), Scheduled Tribe (ST), and Other Backward Classes (OBC) in all B.Tech. individual_reviews.title: Anand-ICE is a fantastic choice if you are searching for a college that has calm vibe.

content.Placements: I am a 2nd-year B.Tech student at Anand-ICE pursuing my degree in CS (AI). I have spent almost 1.5 years in this college, and if we talk about the placements, they really provide 90-95% placements. The staff at the placement cell is very supportive and makes sure the best students get the best companies they deserve and gives their best to approach good companies for future connections.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very luxurious and is full of greenery. On the other hand, when we talk about the infrastructure of the hostel, the wall paint has faded a little bit, but the facilities provided in the hostel are well-equipped with hot water supply, purified drinking water, and cleaning staff. The college is famous due to its infrastructure and the serenity of the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Anand International College of Engineering Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: Anand International College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Anand International College of Engineering admission 2025is entirely entrance-based for the BTech programme. The Bachelor of Technology (BTech) is offered at the undergraduate level.Anand ICE BTech admissionis granted based on rank secured by candidates in JEE Main. However, the college also offers BTech Lateral Entry. The application process for BTech is carried out in the online mode. Aspirants who wish to get admission to the BTech programme must register for admission through the official website of Anand International College of Engineering. Candidates must fill in all the necessary details during the application process at Anand ICE.Anand International College of Engineeringdelivers its courses in full-time mode. The college accepts the rank and scores of JEE Main for admission to various Engineering courses.

Anand ICE admission is entrance examination based. The college accepts the JEE Main rank for admission to the BTech programme. The minimum eligibility forAnand ICE BTech admissionis Class 12 with different subject combinations and Diploma/ BSc/ DVoc qualification for BTech lateral entry. Given below areAnand ICE coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Read More:AICE Brochure 2025

Anand International College of Engineering admission for the BTech programme includes registration, entrance exam, merit list, counselling process and more. Eligible candidates seekingAnand ICE admissionmust apply for fresh admission on the college website and simultaneously apply for the Rajasthan Engineering Admission Process (REAP) counselling process. Check below the Anand International College of Engineering admission process:
STEP 1: Anand International College of Engineering Application

Anand International College of Engineering's application process has begun. Candidates can visit the Anand ICE website: aice.nopaperforms.com and fillAnand ICE application form. The mode of application is online. Candidates need to first register and then fill out the application form and opt for a course of choice and specialisation of their choice.
STEP 2: Anand International College of Engineering Selection round

Candidates must appear for JEE Main and must simultaneously apply for the REAP Counselling Process where they must select Anand International College of Engineering and the branch for the BTech programme. Next, candidates must appear for the counselling process. The campus shortlists candidates for various courses based on the JEE Mains or REAP counselling process.

Anand International College of Engineering admission can also be made based on Class 12 performance to the BTech programme but priority is given to candidates who have a valid rank in JEE Main. Once the selection rounds are over, a merit list is released to announce the names of shortlisted candidates.
STEP 3: Anand International College of Engineering Counselling and Seat Allotment

The shortlisted aspirants are further required to come for document verification and seat allotment at Anand ICE. Once, the seat is allotted, candidates need to pay anAnand International College of Engineering feeto confirm their seat. Candidates must carry original documents along with their self-attested copies for the verification process at the time of reporting.
Check out more on Anand International College of Engineering admission in the below video:

paragraphs: Anand-ICE extends support to the students in their Campus placement journey. The institute has a record of providing 100% placements to all job seekers in the last seven years. The Training and Placement Cell of the institute has strong associations with several prominent corporates across India that provide focused industry orientation to nurture students' learning, equip them with industry preparedness, and help them find the right career opportunities.

Anand International College of Engineering has successfully concluded the placement drive for the year 2024. As per the report, the highest package package offered during Anand International College of Engineering placements in 2024 stood at INR 15.6 LPA . The highest package offered was to the students of the Computer Science branch of the 2024 batch. The top recruiters of Anand International College of Engineering in 2024 included Intellipaat, Fynd, Swiggy, TCS, HCL, Adani Group, IBM, Bosch, Cognizant, etc.

Earlier, the highest package and average package offered to the batch 2023 were INR 18 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. Further, a 100% placement rate and more than 150 job opportunities were recorded during Anand International College of Engineering placements in 2023. The highest package offered was to the student of the Computer Science branch as a Product Manager in Unreal AI company. Top companies visited the campus such as TCS, Amazon, Deloitte, Cyntexa, Biz4Group, etc.
Check out more on Anand International College of Engineering Placements in the below video:

reviews.review_heading: Anand-ICE is a fantastic choice if you are searching for a college that has calm vibe.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very luxurious and is full of greenery. On the other hand, when we talk about the infrastructure of the hostel, the wall paint has faded a little bit, but the facilities provided in the hostel are well-equipped with hot water supply, purified drinking water, and cleaning staff. The college is famous due to its infrastructure and the serenity of the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overview of Anand international college of engineering.
reviews.review_text: Colleges have great infrastructure and a good environment, and the same hostels also have great facilities like Wi-Fi, AC, and cleaning.  Labs, classrooms, and the library are all fully air conditioned and clean. Good experience working in labs, studying in classrooms, and in the library. Hostel mess food is good. There are four meals provided for the first time breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner. There are also all sports and GYM facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: My B.Tech journey in Anand International College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are several facilities available on the campus such as temple, gym, hygienic food, air-conditioned and green garden for fresh air and morning walking, Wi-Fi availability, well-furnished, labs, library, and so on. The main thing is that the qualities of the faculty such as canteen, mess, and sports are too good.

reviews.review_heading: Bad experience ever after joining.
reviews.review_text: The hostel food quality is poor, often lacking variety and proper hygiene. Meals are repetitive, with undercooked or overly greasy food. Mess hygiene is questionable, leading to frequent student complaints. Many prefer outside food due to the land taste and quality issues.

reviews.review_heading: A good academic environment with state-of-the-art infrastructure and great placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides splendid infrastructure, including smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, a theater-style setup, clean and well-maintained classrooms, and an open-access library with barcode-based circulation. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, landscaped greenery with rich architecture, and has a 24/7 secured campus with around 200 CCTV cameras. Some believe that the college infrastructure is conducive to learning and innovation, while others say that the college offers a holistic learning experien...

reviews.review_heading: If students get into this college through REAP counseling, then they can join it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided in the college and hostel 24x7. Some labs are above average and some labs are not so good. If students are willing to choose (AI-ML), then all labs are good. The library is also provided by the college. We do not have to purchase any book, and we can issue from there. Sports facilities are also good. Every game is available on campus like badminton, volleyball, cricket, chess, carrom, TT, and squash. A gym is also provided only for host students and the gym is average. Food qua...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good and provides the highest placement chances.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connections at the college are very good and strong, and available throughout the campus. Medical facilities of college are connected with Nav Jivan Hospital. Hostel in college is very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and decent placements, but teaching quality needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Anand International College of Engineering has a good infrastructure with well-equipped lab, classrooms, a digital library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Labs have modern equipment, but maintenance could be better. Library has a decent collection of books and online resources. Hostel provides basic facilities with clean rooms, but maintenance can be improved. Mess food is average, with a mix of good and bad days. Canteen offers snacks and fast food at reasonable prices. Medical facilities include a fir...

reviews.review_heading: At Anand International College of Engineering infrastructure and facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: In Anand International College of Engineering, there are approximately 2500 PC available in labs in which they have each sub different labs available they use i7 processors in PC. The canteen and mess are good. They have medicine if anyone is ill.

reviews.review_heading: Decent Experience with Supportive Faculty and nice infrastructure, but Room for Improvement.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, computer labs,toilets and classroom were really good, clean and working. The hostel staff is good but the mess food was digestible at best. The canteen was average. We have a basketball court, volleyball court, football court and greenery. We have an annual Sports meet too.

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements in 2025, a Really good academic environment with state-of-the-art Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: One of the best Infrastructures of any college in Jaipur. Well-ventilated rooms, with high-speed internet connectivity around every corner of the college. The Labs were well-equipped with high-tech equipment, which gave hands-on practical experience to every student. The library consists of every book that a student wants to read. I didn't stay at the hostel but hearing from my friends, the hostels were pretty good but only the mess food was okay and eatable. We have our own canteen, which is op...

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college just be proactive about it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility works great, and if you face any issues, you can talk to the administration to make adjustments about the speed. In my opinion, the Wi-Fi facility is one of the best things about this college. Labs are great, classrooms are spacious, and the overall infrastructure is also good. The library is also great, offering books to suit whatever you need. The hostel is good enough, with all facilities there. Sports and gym facilities are also there, and the quality of food is comparatively ...

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure. I am satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with modern design elements. Our lecture rooms are spacious, ventilated, and properly lit. If I talk about hostel rooms, surely they are one of the best. Rooms are spacious and properly ventilated. There is a balcony. There is an option to choose between air conditioning and air ducts as a cooling method in summer. Wi-Fi works great with an average speed of 80 Mbps. There are multiple sports available like football, basketball, volleyball, chess, badminton, table tenni...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placements, infrastructure, and facilities are exceptional.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-designed with modern elements. Hostel offers spacious rooms with proper ventilation and the option to choose between air-conditioning and air ducts. Wi-Fi is good and the average speed is 50-80 Mbps. The library covers both curricular topics and subjects for deeper knowledge. There are numerous sports facilities available including badminton, table tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, squash, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at AICE as a day scholar has been amazing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of ANAND INTERNATIONAL COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING is well maintained and convenient for students. The library offers a wide range of books for academic purposes and is equipped with internet facilities, which help in studying. The college also has a canteen. Which provide a variety of food options for students. Its affordable prices make it convenient for all students. For girls, the transport service is completely free, which is a great benefit. In sports, the college provides bo...

college_info.college_name: Anand International College of Engineering Scholarship Details

paragraphs: For a B.Tech. in Civil Engineering programme, the Anand International College of Engineering charges an annual fee of INR 85,000. The annual hostel fee ranges from Rs. 94,000 per annum to Rs.1,65,000 per annum. The course is available for lateral entry candidates who have passed a minimum of three years/two years (lateral entry) diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST category).

Students who are pursuing BTech programme at Anand International College of Engineering can avail various scholarships. Anand International College of Engineering scholarships can be availed by meritorious students. Given below is the detailed information about Anand ICE scholarships:
Entry-level Merit Scholarship

This scholarship is awarded to students based on their JEE Main percentile or Class 12 score. Only those students are entitled to get this scholarship who have obtained minimum 80% aggregate in Class 12 or 65 percentile and above in JEE Main exam. A certain percentage of first year tuition fee is awarded as the scholarship. Given below is the tabular representation of quantum of scholarship:
JEE Main Score (in %ile)
Class 12 Score (in %)
Scholarship (in %)
Anand Merit Scholarship

This scholarship is awarded based on the marks scored by candidates in each semester of BTech. Students with a minimum of 80% marks in each semester can only apply for this scholarship scheme. A certain percentage of tuition fee is awarded as the scholarship. Given below is quantum of scholarship:
Marks Scored (in %)
Scholarship (in %)
Abroad Training Scholarship

Anand Intrnational College of Engineering also extends Abroad Training Scholarship to the qualifying students in Anand STAT (Scholarship Test for Abroad Training) for an internship at renowned overseas institutions and industries.

Yes, Anand International College of Engineering offers merit-based scholarships. Anand Merit Scholarship is awarded based on the marks scored in each semester of BTech. Students with a minimum of 80 per cent marks in each semester can only apply for this scholarship scheme. Students scoring between 90- 100%,  85-89.99% and 80-84.99% in BTech semester exams are awarded a scholarship of 20%,  15% and 10% of the Tuition Fee respectively of the respective semester.

faqs.answer: A:    Datta Meghe College of Engineering is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Datta Meghe College of Engineering are Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Telecommunication Engineering, Chemical Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do Datta Meghe College of Engineering offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Datta Meghe College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent. OR Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

review_content.Placements: DMCE offers decent placements, mainly for IT/CS branches. The average goes like 3 LPA - 5 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. Core branches get lower offers, and faculty is supportive. Training and placement cell is active. Training is given to students, but students need to perform to achieve.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are spacious buildings, well-equipped labs, a large library, Wi-Fi campus (just for study), and decent classrooms. Library is good. It has good collection of books. There are no hostels or sporting grounds, which are the two drawbacks students faced, other than that, there are no issues.
