overview_faqs.question: Is Datta Meghe College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Datta Meghe College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Datta Meghe College of Engineering has a rating of 3.34 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.92 on Campus Life, 3.36 on Placements, 3.62 on Faculty and 3.39 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Datta Meghe College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good college in Navi Mumbai with quite less fees and decent placement.

content.Placements: I have heard from seniors that here we have around 4-5 LPA as the average package, and 8-10 LPA is the highest from my branch. Recruiting companies which come here are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and Mahindra. Most of the service-based companies come to this college for bulk recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: In the name of infrastructure, we just have 3 buildings, and even in that, 1 is under construction. We have 1 building of 11 floors for tech branches (Comp, IT, AI/ML, EXTC) and another new building for Civil, Infra, and Mechanical branches. We get decent facilities like Wi-Fi in the library. The canteen is quite decent, but this college doesn't have its own ground, that's an issue here. We just have a badminton court in the main building, and that's it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Datta Meghe College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is 70-75 percent according to the 2024 placements. The average package is 4.5 LPA, and the highest package offered is 12 LPA in this college in the computer engineering branch and AIDS. Top recruiting companies for our course are Accenture, Mindspace, Capgemini, LTI, and TCS. Most of the students got internships at Wipro. Roles like data structure, DSA, and AI ML are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is average. The infrastructure is not too good for first-year students. Wi-Fi is available with a good connection. Classrooms are big, so 70 students can sit comfortably. The library is too big with Wi-Fi connection, and books are well managed. The canteen is average because it is under construction. Medical facilities are available. Badminton club, cricket, and football clubs are also available. This college is not too focused on sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of DMCE in brief.

content.Placements: DMCE offers decent placements, mainly for IT/CS branches. The average goes like 3 LPA - 5 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. Core branches get lower offers, and faculty is supportive. Training and placement cell is active. Training is given to students, but students need to perform to achieve.
content.Infrastructure: There are spacious buildings, well-equipped labs, a large library, Wi-Fi campus (just for study), and decent classrooms. Library is good. It has good collection of books. There are no hostels or sporting grounds, which are the two drawbacks students faced, other than that, there are no issues.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great staff. They are supportive and helpful.

content.Placements: Around 50 to 60% of students are placed in the recently passed out batch. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package is around 8 LPA, and the lowest is around 2.5 LPA. Roles offered are manager and fresher. Internships are also provided at a great level.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is like average. Labs and classrooms are decent. Quality of food is like okay. About hostel I have learned its fine. The campus is quite good. The infrastructure is also fine with a great vibe. Working facilities like lift are available. There are fresh seats, and a badminton court is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Top choice for civil engineering at Mumbai University.

content.Placements: Over the past few years, the placement rate for civil engineering in DMCE has been around 53 to 60% which is decent, considering the competition in core engineering placements. Highest salary package offered in our department is up to 10 LPA. Lowest salary package goes to 2.5 LPA. Roughly 72 to 80% of the students secure internships. Roles offered in my course are mostly site engineer, quantity surveyor, project engineer, structural engineer, and civil designer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has two buildings and a third under construction, which will soon be working with a single Building, specially for coal branches like civil. We have multiple labs for practicals with excellent classrooms. A library and Wi-Fi are available. We also have a canteen, and for sports we have a badminton court. Currently, our college does not provide hostel facilities.

placement_report.college_name: Datta Meghe College of Engineering Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Datta Meghe College of Engineering Placement overview
paragraphs: DMCE has an active Training & Placement (T&P) cell that makes efforts to develop and strengthen the relationship with the corporate world. The cell works round the year to liaison with major organisations. Apart from this, the cell is also responsible for facilitating training, arranging live projects, arranging personality development sessions, initiating campus recruitment programmes and providing placement assistance to the students. This is the reason that DMCE has been recording phenomenal placement statistics over the years and each year is surpassing previous year's records.
DMCE recently completed its placements season for 2021 batch. A few interesting highlights of DMCE placements 2021 are enlisted below:
Highest recruited branch
Computer Science Engineering (67 students)
Total students placed
Capgemini, HCL, Godrej, Reliance Jio, Persistent, Tech Mahindra, among others
Total students receiving internship offers
Top internship offering companies
Siemens, Schindler, GAIL India Limited, Xerox, Cidco, Padeco, Godrej, among other

During 2021 placements, the Computer Science Engineering branch of DMCE recorded the highest number of students placed, closely followed by Infotech branch. However, this year, the number of students placed in almost all the branches (except Civil and Mechanical) has dipped due to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. However, if we consider the overall scenario, the number of students placed across all the branches jumped from 154 to 185. For more details, refer to the graph given below:

During DMCE placements 2021, eminent recruiters across the country visited the campus for placements and offered high-end packages. Some of the top DMCE recruiters that visited the campus of 2021 placements are given below:
Image source: Official website

As evident from the below graph, the number of students places during 2021 internships significantly dipped from 344 to 154. Almost every branch (except Infotech) recorded a significant dip in terms of internship offers bagged by the students. A branch-wise split of DMCE internship statistics are represented in the graph below:
Some of the top companies that have offered internships top to the students of DMCE during recent year internships are shown below:
Image source: Official website

DMCE has a wide network of alumni working across various sectors. This is indicated in the below infographic which shows that approximately 22% of DMCE alumni are currently associated with the Engineering sector, closely followed by 13% in Information Technology. These DMCE alumni are recruited in some of the top MNCs, including TCS, Capgemini, Accenture, Infosys, Cognizant, Worley Godrej, etc. The detailed sector-wise statistics for Hindustan University alumni are shown in the pie chart:
*'Others' represents the combined data of multiple sectors, including Research, Quality Assurance, Marketing, Arts & Design, Finance, Support and Human Resource.

description: Datta Meghe College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Datta Meghe College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Datta Meghe College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 117660 and 433819 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 117660, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 122010.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 117660.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Datta Meghe College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 75.65 and 92.08, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 92.08. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 75.65, Mechanical bec

Datta Meghe College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 92.08. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 92.89 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top three most competitive specialisations were M.E. in Civil Engineering, followed by M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, and M.E. in Computer Engineering, with the cutoff being 18.96, 18.33 and 0.67, respectively.

Classrooms are big, so 70 students can sit comfortably. The library is too big with Wi-Fi connection, and books are well managed. The canteen is average because it is under construction. Medical facilities are available. Badminton club, cricket, and football clubs are also available. This college is not too focused on sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DMCE in brief.
reviews.review_text: There are spacious buildings, well-equipped labs, a large library, Wi-Fi campus (just for study), and decent classrooms. Library is good. It has good collection of books. There are no hostels or sporting grounds, which are the two drawbacks students faced, other than that, there are no issues.

reviews.review_heading: Great staff. They are supportive and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is like average. Labs and classrooms are decent. Quality of food is like okay. About hostel I have learned its fine. The campus is quite good. The infrastructure is also fine with a great vibe. Working facilities like lift are available. There are fresh seats, and a badminton court is available.

reviews.review_heading: Top choice for civil engineering at Mumbai University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two buildings and a third under construction, which will soon be working with a single Building, specially for coal branches like civil. We have multiple labs for practicals with excellent classrooms. A library and Wi-Fi are available. We also have a canteen, and for sports we have a badminton court. Currently, our college does not provide hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best choice for 90-95% CET score students.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided by college management for all branches. Since we are talking about information technology, I will narrate my experience. For IT students, all types of labs are provided I mean whatever you will need for studying is available however its quality is not exactly excellent but it works. Wi-Fi is provided throughout the campus and it works fine. Library contains books for all departments and subjects and its very huge and quite so you won't have any problems while studyin...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Datta Meghe College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good in the college. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are proper. We have well-maintained classrooms. Library is also well-maintained. There is no hostel in the college. We have to take PG outside of the college. College has canteen facilities and the food is average. They conduct sports and games. They also have a medical room.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is really good and staff is really helpful. Placements are good too.
reviews.review_text: Well, there are no official hostels for this college. But there are many PGs that are available nearby. Also, there are many different cities nearby, so students may live there too as they get a connected railway line which is just 2 minutes away from this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students from Kalyan Dombivli, Thane.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good. The college library has ample copies of every book relevant to the course and it also has Wi-Fi. Washrooms are really clean. There is no ground on campus but a badminton court is available. The college has a canteen too.

reviews.review_heading: A deep drive into the pros and cons of Data Meghe College of Engineering (DMCE), Airoli.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available include a badminton court and a sports room with equipment for indoor games. The college does not provide hostel facilities, so students who do not live in Mumbai prefer to stay in PGs or rental rooms. There is a canteen in the college, but the quality of the food can be improved. The classrooms are good, and the equipment in the lab is well-stocked.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, satisfied with the college, faculty loved the college, placements are moreover good.
reviews.review_text: There is a big library and gym is also there. Many other sports activities are there. There is a badminton court. Canteen is also there and various sports activities are conducted. Ground is also available for sports like cricket, football, and various sports. They also organise gaming events.

reviews.review_heading: Not the best, but a college is a college!
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs do not have ACs, the library doesn't have really good books. The canteen is really small and messy. No sports and games can be held in college due to very small space. It has no hostel; the only time the college goes under maintenance is before the NAAC visit.

reviews.review_heading: Review about my college DMCE.
reviews.review_text: The labs are well-maintained with proper arrangements and PCs, which makes it easy for students. The library has various books; even students are provided with Wi-Fi all over the college. The mess is not that great but can be said to be average, and sports are limited, while medical facilities are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Average teachers, decent placement, below-average campus. Overall, an average college.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have any hostels. However, there are many PGs near the college. I guess the rent there is 5-7k, so I don't have much idea. Messes are also decent. I am a day scholar, so I don't have much idea about the hostel and mess. And talking about infrastructure, it is average; the college infrastructure is good, but it lacks play areas and a campus where students can chill. Otherwise, it's nice.

reviews.review_heading: A good decent college with good placement .
reviews.review_text:
No hostel facility available but you can take PG near college my course lab is well maintained Electronics and telecommunication lab. Canteen is also good
And there is gym and badminton court and game room with carrom and chess gym also his equipped with good machines .
